title: Cooking Korean Lesson
description: Do you love Korean foods? Do you know how to make kimchi? Or do you know how to make bibimbap? Let's play and find out together in this fun cooking game where you will learn how to cook and serve the best kimchi and bibimbap you can make!

title: Takeover
description:
Takeover is a real-time strategy game where you command squads of units to protect your strongholds from enemies and seize their buildings to win.

For centuries the Rivadis Empire ruled the continent in its shine and glory. But now it fell into necromancers’ hands and dying. Time for Takeover has come! 

Lead one of 3 nations in the battle for Rivadis. Each nation has 5 types of squads, 3 types of strongholds and magic spells. In addition, you can build gold mines, farms to hire more squads, and obelisks to get more mana.

Key features:
- Real-time strategy with squads
- 3 nations that you can control (and an extra Necromancers nation)
- 5 squad types
- 3 spells and a powerful Grand Spell for each nation.
- Edicts - upgrades that make your army stronger
- 8 levels for each nation

title: Extreme Drift Racing
description: Extreme Drift Racing est un jeu de course. Le jeu dispose de cinq emplacements où le joueur dérive et accumule des points pour lesquels il peut acheter des véhicules (13 voitures).

title: Furious Speed
description: Speed is the essence of this game! Get a super cool sport car and drive as fast as you can! Avoid collision with other cars and don’t let the police to get you. Unlock new cars be scoring enough points. You get points for overtaking the other cars (if the car is on the lane next to yours). Let the speed make you furious!

title: Top Shootout
description: Devenez la meilleure gachette de tout le Far West! Des bandits ont capturé des otages et les retiennent prisonniers dans le saloon. Vous êtes le seul à pouvoir les sauver! Rechargez votre arme et descendez tous les malfrats ainsi que leurs chefs!

title: City Blocks
description: City Blocks is a match-3 puzzle game. Strategically place new buildings and upgrade them to build the largest possible city before you run out of space.

title: Don’t touch the red
description: Un jeu conçu pour vous divertir dès le début. Chaque mode respecte une seule règle: toucher autant de tuiles vertes que possible, et ne pas toucher la tuile rouge!

title: Mixed World
description: Mixed World est un jeu de puzzle particulièrement cool et fun dans lequel vous devrez faire disparaitre toutes les balles rouges de la plateforme en faisant glisser votre personnage dessus. Vous pourrez aussi utiliser différents objets pour vous aider à passer les niveaux les plus difficiles.

title: Final Freeway 2R
description:
Speed through several exciting stages. Pick a character and choose your path as you drive!
The impressive sense of speed, catchy tunes and a super-retro look, will kick you back to the 80s! Beat the clock to the next checkpoint and don't let the pesky challenger beat you!

title: Save kitten
description:
CATASTROPHE! Angry Tom Cat decoyed kittens into his tower. Save as many kittens as you can!
Run, catch them with a trampoline, and carry them to their Mother Cat’s basket!
Kittens are desperate for your help. Who will save them, if not you?

- Colorful HD graphics and animation
- Buy cool clothes and improve them
- Complete exciting missions and earn coins
- Discover the magic chest and receive gifts
- Catch super boosters: time increase, super speed and magnetism, but beware of bombs
- Raise your level and beat the records of other players!

title: Going Right
description:
Bring the bird to its nest without getting hit by the obstacles
A simple one touch avoid and collect game, with five differents game modes:
20 Hard Levels to enjoy!

NORMAL MODE: You can start the game from any level you have already completed.
DEATH MODE: You got only 10 attempts to complete all the levels.
TIME ATTACK: Beat your best time in this game mode, and show yourself what you can do.
INFINITE RUN: Fly as long as you can avoiding the obstacles and collecting coins.
SHOP: Buy new skins and choose different colors to customize your bird.

That’s all!

title: ShotWildWest
description:
ShotWildWest is an arcade game set in the wild west.
Test your fingers by challenging the speed,
train your mind to hit obstacles quickly and accurately, trying to break all records!

title: Funny Rescue Gardener
description: Samantha is a great gardener, but even the best will get accidents sometimes. Let's play and rescue Samantha from the horrible accident! Help her recover from the wounds and have fun!

title: Demon Killer
description: Vous êtes le seul à pouvoir sauver le monde ! Armez-vous d'un arsenal d'armes et arrêtez l'invasion de démons. Ne vous arrêtez pas et utilisez votre potentiel de tir.

title: Runaway Toad
description:
Un conte superbement illustré sur une princesse dérangée et un crapaud en fuite

L'histoire

Il était une fois une princesse qui vivait dans un grand château. Elle avait embrassé plein de crapauds pour trouver son prince charmant. Mais le crapaud n'aspire qu'à être un crapaud, pas à vivre dans un château (aussi grand soit-il). Alors, le crapaud fit la seule chose qu'il pouvait faire : s'échapper ! Qu'il pleuve ou qu'il fasse beau, de jour comme de nuit, le crapaud ne cesse de s'enfuir. Fais attention aux dirigeables, aux hiboux et autres dangers et mange des insectes, gagne de nouveaux pouvoirs, explore les marais et trouve les secrets !

Fonctionnalités

Marais à génération procédurale avec plein d'éléments faits-main
Contrôle élégant à un doigt
Gagne des pouvoirs en mangeant des insectes
Rythme dynamique avec sauts tranquilles dans les marais et poursuites captivantes avec les dirigeables
+ de 100 missions pour mettre tes talents à l'épreuve et gagner de nouveaux crapauds
Secrets cachés à découvrir
Illustrations et visuels somptueux avec heure du jour et effets météo
Ambiance audio fidèle au calme typique des marais

title: Moto Maniac
description:
This trial bike game is simple yet challengling - the levels look short, but it's not that easy to reach the finish line. Get through the piles of logs, boxes and even boats carefully - this is what 'trial' is all about.

Overcome all the obstacles and don't let the biker hit head or flop. The balance is key - lean back or forward for the best grip.

Compete for the best score with the other players via highscore table - show your skills to everyone.

title: Noob Huggy
description:
You must be a partner in the adventure of a huggy living in a cute block world. Huggy, who is both noob and funny, needs to escape from slimes. You have to get the key and activate the door and help him move to the next level.    

How to Play?
"WASD" to move & "Arrow Keys" to move    
Mobile Touch Control    
Double jump is active in the game.

title: Super Cute Cat
description:
You need to help super sweet cat hunt the mutated cats. You must destroy the mutated cats and get the key and move on to the next level. There are different difficulties in each level, do not forget to collect candies.  

How to Play?
WASD + Mobile touch control

title: Moto Fury
description: Un jeu de course palpitant. Découvrez le plaisir des virées en moto sur une autoroute infinie et très empruntée. Plus vous roulez dangereusement, plus vous accumulez d'argent et de points. Avec votre argent, vous pouvez acheter de meilleures motos plus puissantes. Devenez un rebelle et semez la pagaille sur la route ! Essayez juste de ne pas vous écraser en roulant à une vitesse folle.

title: 3D Darts
description: Darts 3D, a famous classic game now on your device in gorgeous 3D, defeat opponents in hundreds of levels. Or just play with your friends on one device. Just throw the dart and get a score. Very easy to start, but hard to master.

title: Popit vs Spinner
description: Try to remove all the popits in those 3 levels by matching at least 2 of the same tiles at once. Use the spinner mode when no matches are left to generate new ones and clean the whole level.

title: Slimoban 2
description: In each level, you need to collect the golden coin, escape from the slimes, and destroy them if possible. The girl can collect magic potions that help to lift big wooden blocks and slimes. After lifting the blocks or the slimes, you need to drop them in the right places. There is also water in the game, and you can drop things in there. You can move blocks, collect them, and drop them. You also need to lure the slimes in the trap, throw boxes in them, and push them into the water. But all of these things you can do are not obligatory, the main thing you need to do to pass the level is to collect the coin.

title: Slalom Ski Simulator
description:
Slalom Ski Simulator is a HTML5 Sport Game. 
Go around gates to complete the track and try to improve your best time on each track!

title: Morphit
description:
Morphit is a hypercasual game where you have to change your shape to pass trough the obstacles.
Try to last as long as you can and unlock all the achievements!
Game Controls:
touch the buttons to change the shape of the player and match the obstacles'ones.

title: Funny Pet Haircut
description:
Take your messy pets, alpaca and cat to the hair salon. Wash and dry your pets before
giving them a brand new look by changing their colors and giving them pattern look.
Dress up too. And turn them into a stylish beauty!

title: Cricket Championship
description: Choose your favorite International teams and start playing Cricket Championship. Watch the line of the ball and swing your bat in time to hit the ball out of the park. This game is really fun for all true cricket fans who like to smash boundaries and win the match in style.

title: Saguaro
description: Help Saguaro, a mexican cactus, to go for a jog without hit his balloon friends. Avoid them as long as you can. Every time you hit a balloon you will lose one your beloved items, like his hat or one of his maracas! You can restore your lives collecting the glowing maracas you will find on the road!

title: Maze of Death
description: Escape from a maze full of zombies in this old style first person shooter like doom. You can use all the weapons you can find in the game to make your way through hordes of zombies. Find the exit as fast as you can.

title: Doll Queen Designer
description:
Create her dream toy by collecting the dresses and coloring them.
Doll Queen Designer have smooth controls and over 100 levels.

title: Amazing Sheriff
description: Pin on your shiny sheriff's badge, load up your six-shooters, and get ready for some amazing action. Take control of this high flying Sheriff on a wheel-spinning, bottle-breaking wild ride! Yee-haw!

title: Poppy Strike
description: Poppy Strike is a 3D shooting game which features gun game mode with big arsenal of weapons and famous dust 2 map crowded with huggy wuggy, your mission is to shoot all incoming huggy wuggy and try to survive by the end of each round in order to get new weapons.

title: Hit Em Up
description: Hit Em Up is a very cool game to destroy zombies and you have a bazooka with super bombs. Save the whole world by clearing the planet from the zombie invasion!

title: Doctor Teeth
description: Become a dentist and take care of your patients' teeth! Use different tools to treat caries, bad breath and extract teeth. Play fun mini games and use the stethoscope hints in case you're stuck on your to-do list. Can you give all your patients their smile back?

title: Super Pop It
description:
Super Pop It! is a fun relaxing game and a unique game to play on. This is a super relaxing game to play for hours.
We have got different shapes of pop gadgets, click on the pops to smash them and clear the board.
Be quick and smash all the pops and feel the relax from the tensions, this game is for all ages and you can play for hours.

title: Santa Games
description: Collect some gifts along the way to find the magic sleigh! In this pixel-art game there are 7 levels to play. Besides gifts, you can also collect magic letters and then play another 7 special levels (minigames): Diamond rain, Drop gift, Brick out and more!

title: Pixeroids
description: Naviguez avec votre vaisseau spatial et détruisez les astéroïdes qui vous barrent le chemin sans les percuter! FEU!

title: Intergalactic Battleship
description: Détruisez les vaisseaux alien pour sauver la planète terre! Appuyez ou cliquez sur la grille ennemie pour localiser et détruire les vaisseaux des envahisseurs…avant qu'ils n'anéantissent les votres!

title: Incredible Box
description:
Incredible Box is a very traditional puzzle game. Roll the box to the target position, nothing more.

It looks simple, but this game is hard, very hard.

In order to help all of you can finish all of the levels. We have provided the solution of all levels.

The control is simple. Simply touch the box and roll it. And the game is completely 3D with very beautiful water effect.

title: Gun Simulator
description: Gun Simulator Shooting Range offers realistic and closest experience for semi-automatic and modern weapons shooting on the firing range. Imagine classic gun shooting closest experience with dynamic weapons sounds when you pull off the trigger aim for bull's eye.

title: Road Fury
description: Libérez votre fureur sur l'autoroute et abattez tout ce qui bouge ! Si vous ne pouvez pas tirer sur quelque chose, prenez-le... ce sont des bonus ! Améliorez votre voiture pour réaliser un trajet plus long, abattez les boss et allez aussi loin que vous pouvez pour pouvoir comparer vos meilleurs scores avec les autres ! Devenez le roi de la route !

title: Triangle Run
description:
Play Triangle Run a Hypercasual game that will make your head spin!

Just one click/tap to play!

Just press and hold once on the screen and the triangle changes direction as soon as you release the button the triangle returns to the initial direction as the world rotates around you!

So try to complete the impossible level and try to get the best possible record!

It sounds easy but instead it will be a tough task!

Enjoy Triangle run!

title: Baseball for Clowns
description: Henk was the best baseball player in the world before jokers cheated and defeated him with false means. And now, after Henk has retired, the jokers are back again to cause trouble! Help him get rid of the jokers once and for all!

title: Cricket Hero
description: Are you ready to test your reaction times? In Cricket Hero you’ll face the thrills and ecstasy of being a cricket player. Besides regular cricket balls, they may throw at you some other stuff too.

title: Cut The Rope: Time Travel
description: Remonte le temps avec Om Nom pour nourrir ses ancêtres avec des bonbons ! Cut the Rope: Time Travel est une nouvelle aventure remplie d'action et basée sur la physique qui te fera voyager à travers le temps pour aller croquer du bonbon!

title: Funny Nose Surgery
description: Mia has always had a snotty nose. But now it has been gone too far, and she need to clean it. Help fix her nose problems, maybe with some surgery. You can also put stickers on her nose after that!

title: Dark World
description:
Dark World, the platformer you're been waiting for!
Complete 30 unique levels to escape the dark world but but careful with your enemies. There is always an easier way to reach the end of the level, check all the game platforms to find useful items

-instructions-

Jump - Touch/click the jump button or press `w` on your keyboard
Sword Attack - Touch/click the hit button or press `space` on your keyboard
Throw sword - Touch/click the sword button or press `c` on your keyboard

-key game features-

30 Unique levels
2 types of attacks
Mobile browser optimized
lightweight
HD graphics
3 enemies, each having their own attack
20 languages localization
pause option
Landscape orientation

title: Skating Hero
description: Choose your hero and compete across 3 programs in the Figure Skating event. Hit the matching button (or swipe) as they line up with the top slot. Time your moves perfectly to boost your score and win!

title: Las Vegas Blackjack
description: Profitez de l'ambiance authentique du casino de Las Vegas. L'occasion unique de tenter votre chance et gagner de superbes prix dans le monde dangereux du black jack. Testez différentes stratégies et trouvez celle qui vous assurera la victoire.

title: Coins Rush Run
description: Join the crazy Coins Rush Run and multiply your virtual coins, select the best gates and collect lots of cash!

title: Battalion Commander
description: Get armed to the teeth and fight your way through the enemy territory. You’ll need the help from your fellow soldiers trapped by the foe, ton of upgrades and mighty skills to survive.

title: Funny Camping Day
description: Do you want to take part in a summer camp?! Funny Camping Day is an exciting camping adventure game ever! Go outdoor with your forest-loving friends. Help them to do amazing camp activities: Clean up the camp, set up your tends, enjoy fishing, and light the campfire. Play the role of your friends in different activities. Have fun with Funny Camping day!

title: Model Wedding - Girl Games
description:
Le mariage est le jour le plus important dans la vie de toutes les jeunes filles. Dans ce jeu "Mariage Mannequin", vous vivrez une vraie fête et des émotions très fortes pour le jour du mariage de ce célèbre mannequin. Le plus amusant dans le mariage ce sont les préparatifs, les séances d’habillage, le choix et la conception de la tenue de mariée dont le plus important est la robe de mariée.

4 magnifiques et élégantes futures mariées font confiance à vos talents de fashionista. Avec un corps parfait, un visage de superstar et une coiffure fantaisie, elles veulent toutes être la princesse le jour de leur mariage. Choisissez des tenues branchées, glamour ou traditionnelles pour la future mariée et elle deviendra une véritable princesse au milieu de ses amies et de sa famille.

Tous nos jeux d’habillage pour les filles sont entièrement gratuits et ne proposent aucun achat dans l'application. 200 articles vous permettront de créer une énorme quantité de combinaisons dans ce superbe salon de mariage pour mannequins. Des dizaines de robes classiques, de jupes longues et courtes, de chaussures, de voiles de mariage, de sacs à main, de bouquets et de bijoux, permettront aux jeunes fashionistas de créer de nombreuses tenues de mariage pour les mannequins et de développer leur goût artistique et leur savoir-faire.

Si vous aimez habiller des personnages, nous avons d’autres jeux d’habillage gratuits avec des princesses, des mariées, des fées et d'autres belles filles. Pour les télécharger gratuitement et sans achat dans l'application, cliquez sur "Plus par Games For Girls". Téléchargez-les tous !

title: Las Vegas Roulette
description: Préparez-vous à ressentir les sensations fortes du jeu de hasard de Las Vegas. Cette application de roulette est idéale pour apprendre les bases et élaborer la bonne stratégie ! Jouez à la roulette à tout moment et  n'importe où !

title: Zombie Killer
description: Survivez dans une ville apocalyptique envahie de morts-vivants. Choisissez votre héros et débarrassez la ville des zombies. Utilisez des armes et des explosifs. Gagnez des pièces et réalisez des améliorations pour survivre plus longtemps.

title: Journey Through Hell
description:
Journey Through Hell  is a free 3D platformer game with a beautiful low poly graphics.

Story

After burning in Hell for decades, Hitler takes a few days off from Hell officials to see other parts of Hell.

Game Features

Beautiful low poly environment
Fun and challenging 3D platformer gameplay
Easy to pick up and play
Funny and strange

title: GT Ghost Racing
description:
Choose your vehicle and race through the various tracks compete against the ghosts of racing legends to prove you are the best of the best and collect all the stars! Race through the seasons, night tracks, winter tracks and futuristic neon tracks. 

8 Cars, 9 Tracks, 27 Stars. Race during the seasons, at night and even an icy track.

title: Dunk Up Basketball
description: Dunk Up Basketball is a crazy arcade that anybody will enjoy... Shoot the hoops, unlock new balls, become a basketball star!

title: Ludo Legend
description: Faites une petite partie de Ludo ! Le jeu de plateau préféré de tous ! Jouez seul ou avec vos amis sur un seul appareil ! Il suffit de se le faire passer ! Le design coloré et la mécanique de jeu simple vous divertiront pendant des heures !

title: Street Driver
description: Drive dangerously fast on a highway in traffic, overtake every vehicle, earn cash and buy better cars! Try not to crash at the highest speed. Time to start your engine!

title: My Ice Cream Shop
description:
Hey, Ice Cream Lovers!!! This ice cream truck game is made especially for you guys. The ice cream shop involves a variety of ice cream cones, scoop ice cream cup and so many sweet frozen desserts. You need to serve the ice cream as per customer's requirement in this ice cream making game. Use boosters to have fantastic gameplay, face the difficulties to achieve the level targets and many rewards are waiting for you in my cafe shop game. So play this free cooking game and enjoy an awesome gameplay experience. Start a refreshing new ice cream game with an ice cream truck and sell many kinds of delicious frozen desserts that are sure to delight the customers. Take your dessert shop game to the next level and spread your delicious frozen desserts and milkshakes all over town. Don't forget to share this food truck game with your friends and family.

This is a good chance to turn your love for fine ice cream and frozen treats into ice cream chef game! Get the attention of customers passing by the truck with an amazing presentation of the ice creams. Become an artist with tasty toppings and ice cream decorations and get customers lined up to have those tasty ice creams in your shop management game.

title: Let me in
description: It’s time to test your real skills. A puzzle game. At a bus stop in a bustling big city, as an assistant policeman, you have to get everyone on board safely, and you can’t be overstaffed, and overstaffed cars will be crowded Explosion, so you have to direct the platform personnel to get on and off the bus in an orderly way. Be careful not to hit the passengers on the opposite car, otherwise you will lose, come on.

title: Bunny Quest
description: Ce lapin se lance dans une folle chasse aux carottes ! Aidez-le à atteindre son but en faisant glisser les tuiles pavées pour former un chemin. Un jeu de casse-têtes classique plus difficile qu'il n'y paraît ! Des tonnes de niveaux à travers trois modes à maîtriser. Testez vos compétences et rejoignez le lapin dans son aventure !

title: Water Me Please!
description: This family-friendly puzzle game ‘Water Me Please!’ is beautifully designed to keep everybody happy. It is a perfect mix between puzzles and your childhood memories in a grassy land. Enjoy these easy-to-love characters, a small watering can and a lovely flower in a green farm. Ready to keep your lovely flower happy?

title: Wall Painter
description: Wall Painter  is a casual but very fun puzzle game in which you need to fill all the wall spaces on a building. It can get very tricky at some times, so make sure you move in the right way to ensure that you don’t miss any spot. How many levels can you beat in this game? How far can you go ? We are waiting to see ! Enjoy.

title: Line of Defense 2
description: The best digital battle: shoot approaching enemies tanks and destroy them all! Do not let the enemies cross the red border line!

title: Fidget Spinner Creator
description: Do you like fidgets spinners and have you always wanted to create your own? Design your own spinner and start spinning. Each 5 spins you earn 1 coin.

title: Swim or Die
description:
Save a drowning pet touching the screen as fast as you can.
Collect Time Points and unlock new pets' skins!
See the world changing around you and try to not drown!
Who knows what could happen if you hang in there long enough...

title: Switch Colors
description: Tap the ball and follow the color pattern on each obstacle to cross it! Be careful not to pass through the wrong color, or you’ll have to start again.

title: Anime Dress Up
description:
Create your perfect anime character!
Make a screenshot and use it as your avatar.

Features:
1. Graphics in anime style
2. 10 692 000 combinations of the appearance
3. Many unusual items
4. Cute cats
5. Screenshot button
6. Random button

title: TRZ Battleship
description: In alternate turns, you must guess the positions of all enemy ships, one shot at a time, and defeat them all. But do it before the opponent annihilates all yours!

title: Crazy Knife
description: Chop in the kitchen like a real master. It's so satisfying! - Easy control - Addictive gameplay - Crazy Knife is simple and fun!

title: Fall Heroes Guys
description:
Fall heroes Guys.io Finish dozens of courses and collect crowns. Be the winner of the day! Buy the costumes and change your image. Race with 10-40 people, be the winner of the race! Join the world of Fall heroes guys.io . Race with different costumes on different maps! Make the Difference.

How to Play?
WASD + ZQSD and Arrow Keys - Mobile Control

title: Jewel Blocks Quest
description: Testez vos compétences logiques dans ce puzzle d'arcade complexe. Jouez à un nombre infini de niveaux dans un environnement mystique et battez votre score. Facile et amusant ! Essayez toutes les fonctionnalités de jeu uniques.

title: Mahjong Master 2
description: Le solitaire classique qui consiste à connecter des tuiles chinoises est à portée de main. Pensez bien chacun de vos coups et videz le plateau de ses tuiles empilées en pyramides complexes. Cherchez des tuiles libres similaires pour les connecter et les enlever. Il n'est possible de connecter que les tuiles qui ont au moins un côté libre. Jouez rapidement et marquez des points bonus. Gagnerez-vous toutes les étoiles dorées de tous les modes de jeu ?

title: Pop it Infinity
description:
Pop It Infinity is a fun relaxing game and a unique game to play on.
We have got over 160 different shapes of pop gadgets, click on the pops to smash them and clear the board.
Be quick and smash all the pops and feel the relax from the tensions, this game is for all ages and you can play for hours.

title: Neon King - A local multiplayer Platformer
description:
Neon King est un jeu de canapé multijoueur local

 dans lequel ton seul but est

 pour éliminer votre adversaire.

title: Chiellini Pool Soccer
description:
Try now "Chiellini Pool Soccer" and you can play the new game of Pool billiard soccer themed.
Test the different game modalities, choose your best tactics, you can use 4 different modules, choose the your favorite shirt team and then sign your best record possible, and then see what position you have in the ranking! don't give up plays and replays to beat all your opponents !

title: Neon Slimes
description: Make your opponent fall. Jump on his had to make him weak and small.

title: Donutosaur
description: Feed hungry adorable monster named Donutosaur. He likes candies but the thing he likes the most is a sweet yummy Donut!

title: PixZombies
description: Dans Pix Zombies, un jeu 100% arcade, explosez tous les zombies  que vous croiserez et sauvez le monde!

title: Squid Hero Impostor
description:
Green 456 hero squid impostor watch out for the guys. kill them and find the key get the key reveal the invisible door. You must kill the impostors. Kill them all.

How to Play?
WASD + Mobile Touch Control

title: Yummy Churros Ice Cream
description: Create your own Churros Ice Cream! Go through every step in the tasklist to make your delicious ice cream. Pick your favorite flavour and finish it with a combination of syrups and toppings. Complete your tasklist and unlock achievements!

title: Bunny Graduation Double
description:
Two cute blue and purple bunnies escape from the forest. They must escape from the forest because everything is getting snow white more and more. they need to reach the guard at the end of each level reach the guard and pass the levels!  

How to Play?
*Purple Rabbit Control : WASD  
*Blue Rabbit Control : Arrow Keys  
*Double Jump Available

title: Street Food - Cooking Game
description:
Welcome to Street Food - cooking games the number one free cooking games in the world that puts you in charge of your own street food truck & become a kitchen chef!

Be a master chef of street food and start cooking delicious snacks in this virtual cooking games. There are hot dogs van, pizza van, hamburgers van, French fries van and nachos van! Which one do you want to try first? They all look so yummy! Let's cook the yummy & delicious street food with add some amazing toppings on them so they look as good as the taste. You will love playing chef free cooking games as you make your favorite foods, and you'll love that cooking up a chef quality snack doesn't mess up your whole kitchen!

title: Funny Shopping Supermarket
description: Help Hippo n friends to find all products in their shopping list. There are lists of goods you must find. Pick and put them to their grocery bags. Don't forget to go to the cashier to pay! Funny Shopping Supermarket sells varieties of products: vegetables, candies, clothes, fruits, meats, n carpentry tools. Unlock the achievements, have fun and enjoy the game!

title: Paper Craft Wars
description: Envahis les bâtiments ennemis pour gagner la bataille! Rassemble une armée de chats, de taureaux ou de renards dans Paper Craft Wars. Au début de chaque querelle, toutes tes troupes gardent un bâtiment. Déploie tes forces pour contrôler tout le champ de bataille!

title: Tactical Penguin
description:
Help the penguins not to starve!🥴

This game is inspired to the classic Missile Command gameplay.
Defend your fishies from the pelicans, the penguins will starve if there are not at least 5 fishies.
When the missile is armed by one penguin, simply click to aim at pelican is in a dive, but be careful to blizzard and the wind that affects the flight path.

have fun!

title: Drop Dunks
description: Slide your finger to guide the falling balls into the hoop. How many balls can you get?

title: Quiz Squid Round
description: Quiz Squid Game is a trivia-style game to see if the player has paid attention to the details of the series, let's go show us your best!

title: Knives
description: Knives - Extreme - arcade game in which you will throw knives on a rotating surface, trying not to get into knives. Put your record in this addictive arcade!

title: Moto Maniac 3
description: This is a tilty bike game that will challenge your trial skills to the max. The trial competition is set up in the forest, so be ready to climb over trees and rocks. Your main goal is to overcome all the obstacles as fast as you can. But there is a second (yet important) goal - a wild bear was annoyed by the loud engine sounds and it is chasing you, so be quick not to be caught by the beast!

title: Swimming Pool Romance
description: Lucas is looking for a girl, obviously, at the swimming pool. And he find one, Natasha. She's so cute, he can't resist. Help him attract her with his mojo so they can spend a romantic evening together!

title: Catch Cats
description: Welcome to Catch Cats, have fun in this fantastic game where you have to catch all the cats to increase your best score, what are you waiting for? go and play catch cats and the fun will be guaranteed !!

title: Little Bouncing Guys
description: La tribu des petits hommes-gommes s'est perdue…en laissant un de ses membres derrière elle! Aidez-le à rejoindre les siens, faites-le sauter toujours plus fort et toujours plus haut. Utilisez votre adresse et votre intelligence pour venir à bout des 30 niveaux qui attendent ce petit homme gomme!

title: Hill Racing
description:
Hill Racing! Race your way uphill            
If you're looking for a racing game that does what it takes to be classic, Hill Racing! is the game for you. In Hill Racing, you race your way uphill towards the finish line with plenty of challenges in between! This physics-based game is perfect for those who love to race their cars, and we know how you feel: we've put together a full game cassette containing all the tools you need to drive these hills!            
In Hill Racing, you take on the challenge of driving your way uphill in order to reach the top of the hill. The game features a variety of unique hill climbing environments, as well as different cars that can be upgraded with coins and tricks. You'll need to use your skills and luck to make it to the top, and beware of obstacles along the way!

title: Music Tools
description:
Play music on three instruments, piano, drums, and guitar.
Become a pro musician by learning and playing all the instruments and have a fun time by playing online.
Just use your skills and show them here online and play more games here only with Mapi Games.

title: Big Donuts Mania
description:
Big Donuts Mania is all about these ring-shaped sweets. In this fun and addictive game, you need to match a combination of 3 donuts or 
more. You simply need to swap donuts position by tapping or dragging them. Sounds 
If you've made a match, the donuts will be clear, and you will get the points! The more 
you get, the better you will rank in the high score.
Warning: Big Donuts Mania is as addictive as a box of donuts!

title: Funny Rescue Carpenter
description: Leia is a great carpenter, but even the best will get accidents sometimes. Let's play and rescue Leia from the horrible accident! Help her recover from the wounds and have fun!

title: Yummy Toast
description:
Yummy Toast is the funnest cooking game ever!
Your goal is to make delicious toast by tapping the correct materials and ingredients u needed. Make the tastiest toast and serve to ur customers. Be the best toast master and to unlock all the achievements!

title: Basketball Master 2
description: Play through the 40 challenging levels and try to solve physics based puzzles. You’ll need to avoid solid obstacles, players, smash through glass and wood and figure out how to put the ball through the hoop!

title: Bike Mania 2
description: The most famous bike game of the flash era is back! Tilt and balance your way over the obstacles. Containing 20 levels of sheer frustration and "just one more go" addictiveness, Bike Mania 2 is the ultimate in driving games for those who like a challenge.

title: Comics 456 - Survival Game
description:
🧩 Comics 456 - Squid Survival Game - Mind-bending erase game and fun comedy!

Comics 456 - S-quid Survival Game is an erase game full of comedy stories. Comics 456 - Squid Story is created to bring you the story of the player 456 trying to pass all challenged to be the last survivor and reach 45.6 billion won. In each level, you will laugh out loud with classic but funny scenes of the K-drama.

What are you waiting for? 👀 👀
Download Comics 456 - Survival Game and discover the unexpected twists 🔥🔥

title: A day in the countryside
description:
A pleasant and relaxing day in the countryside?
You will play the role of a farmer struggling with the cultivation of his fields... and some funny and spiteful animals.

MOVE:
- Use arrow keys
- Click or touch and hold on left/right of the character

ACTIONS:
- Click or touch in the animals, something will happen
- Use mouse wheel to zoom
- In winter, click or touch on the screen to jump​ 

HOW TO PLAY
- Take the moles and send them to sleep
- Take the blackbirds with bomb and send them away
- Feed the cute animals for an extra life
- In winter, save snowmen from snowballs

title: BloxdHop
description:
Play through parkour inspired obbys and make your way to the end of the maps! Twist, turn, run and jump your way through large themed worlds - all without falling to your demise. Race to the end, get a high score and earn gold while doing so.


Controls:

WASD - movement
Shift - Run (alternately, double tap w)
Crouch - C (alternately, Z, | or CAPS LOCK)
Chat - T or ENTER
Open Shop - B
Start command - /

Commands:

/rtv - not a fan of this map? Vote to skip it!
/players - see the current players in your lobby.
/xp - See your level and xp.
/played - See how much time you've spent having tons of fun.

title: Daddy Rabbit
description:
Daddy Rabbit must find all his lost babies inside the most amazing underground burrow you've ever seen. These baby rabbits sleep peacefully everywhere, but when daddy rabbit passes by, they will follow him all the way.    
Baby bunnies will follow dad but will cry if they are awake and his dad wanders too far. When that happens, the zombies will get upset and go straight to eat them. That's when daddy rabbit will defend his sons with a carrot punch and give those evil zombies what they deserve.

title: BasketBall
description:
Let’s experience the Retro Style Basketball in 3D. Start shooting the ball and score as much as you can.
There are 3 deadly challenging modes to make you addictive with Basketball action game.

1. Time Attack
2. Sudden Death
3. Challenge

It’s time to dribble, shoot, score, WIN! Choose the ball and head to the basketball court for some awesome shoots. Flick the ball towards the basket to take a shot and feel the fun on playing real basketball. Basketball 3D is an awesome real feel game which can really challenge your shooting skills.

title: Master Checkers
description:
Master Checkers is the best Board Game. Play this stylish version ot the classic board game Checkers.
The game is based on the Italian Checkers gameplay!

title: CarMiss
description: A great action game with you. You have to dodge the attacks with the car you have. They are attacking missiles from all sides. You can get yourself a new and faster vehicle by collecting gold while escaping. If you wish, you can increase the protection of the vehicle with gold or you can strengthen the protection shield by purchasing an anti-rocket gun. To destroy the rockets, you have to collide them with each other.

title: Cowboy VS Martians
description: Les martiens ont débarqué sur terre et ils n'ont pas l'air de venir en amis! Attrapez votre fusil, peignez votre belle moustache et commencez à les dézinguer! Serez-vous le cowboy qui les abattra tous ?

title: Panda Hair-do
description: Vous aimez les pandas ? Cette jeune fille les adore mais ce qu'elle aime encore plus, c'est de prendre soin de son apparence! Aidez-la à s'occuper de ses cheveux, à s'habiller et à se préparer à passer une super journée. Commencez déjà par lui laver les cheveux avant de passer à la suite!

title: Car Rapide
description:
Drive and avoid obstacles on the roads of Senegal.
Collect coins and unlock special cars!

title: Endless Car Chase
description: Préparez-vous à une montée d'adrénaline ultime avec Endless Car Chase, le jeu rapide qui vous met derrière le volant d'une course-poursuite à grande vitesse ! Collectez de l'argent et des power-ups alors que vous foncez à travers les rues de la ville, mais attention à la police qui est à vos trousses. Avec des contrôles faciles à utiliser et un gameplay addictif, ce jeu est prêt à jouer directement hors de la boîte. Mais pourquoi se contenter de l'expérience par défaut quand vous pouvez personnaliser le jeu selon vos préférences ? Modifiez l'environnement, les voitures, et même la musique pour créer une expérience de jeu unique et personnalisée. Préparez-vous à semer la loi et devenir le meilleur pilote de fuite dans Endless Car Chase !

title: Parmesan Partisan
description: You are the last defence, you are a lonely cheesy partisan who has to protect his people from the menace of the Mice People, who wants to conquer an eat all the cheese they can find! You are the last hope of your people: defend them with your shotgun, kill as many rats as you can, and free your nation from the rodents conquerors!

title: Bowling Hero Multiplayer
description:
"Compete with your friends on the same device or with other players from all over the world.

Choose a hero from the six available.

Throw the ball and shoot down as many pins as possible!

How many strikes will you hit?"

title: Mafia Billiard Tricks
description: Mafia Billiard Tricks is a billiard arcade game in which you can play the challenging game of billiards. You are not only playing for fun though; your opponents are part of the infamous mafia. You must earn their respect by beating each crew member!

title: Cross the Bridge
description: In this fun game you must try to complete the path for the car to pass before time runs out, agility and reasoning are a good combination for this game.

title: Nastya Cute Blogger
description: Cute Nastya is a very popular blogger. Her mom and dad help her make cool videos. In this episode, Nastya's family will decorate the house for the holiday, and Nastya herself will choose stylish outfits and help her dad turn into a glamorous fairy. Let's join her and master her makeup skills. Have fun with cute blogger Nastya!

title: Run Gun Robots
description:
Run Gun Robots is a run and gun game, where you have to jump from building to building destroying aggressive robots and avoiding deadly traps. Earn money buy defeating enemies and buy new powerups to to better address this new threat.

Controls:
Mobile: Touch the button on the screen to Jump, Shoot or pass trough a platform.
Keyboard: W or Up to jump, X or Spacebar to shoot, S or Down to pass trough a platform
Game pad: A or LT to Jump, B or RT to shoot, D-pad Down to pass trough a platform

-4 different enemies
-10 levels with increasing difficulty
- Engaging music

title: Fantasy Star Pinball
description: Atteignez les sommets du high score dans ce magnifique jeu de flipper fantasy en 3D! Shootez la boule, et trouvez les scénarios cachés pour booster vos points.

title: MAGA run
description:
Le président sortant doit s'échapper du FBI.
Trouve les bulletins de vote perdus, collecte suffisamment d'argent et utilise Twitter pour réussir.
Peut-être peux tu regagner ta présidence?

title: Two Impostor Squid Challenge
description:
Are you ready for the two impostor squid challenge game that you can play with your friend for two? Play with your friend in two player green light red light game and tug of war game.

How to Play?
Blue Player "A" Press Key & Mobile Touch Control / Red Player "P" Press Key & Mobile Touch Control

title: Crossword
description:
Solve thousands of crossword puzzles for free, no subscription required!
Solving crosswords is like mental excercise, it's challenging and relaxing at the same time. Let’s get solving! Play  "Crossword" now and join the thousands of crossword enthusiasts!

title: Office.io
description: Office.io is an office simulator game in which you are the boss. Hire employees and accept or deny their requests. Be careful! Your decisions will make your employees happy or sad. If motivation is too low, employees will do crazy things!

title: Astro Digger
description: Astro Digger est un jeu d'arcade solo fun et addictif qui se joue avec les flèches de votre clavier ou simplement au doigt. Faites la connaissance de Astro Digger, le mineur de l'espace, et aidez-le à accomplir sa tâche en récupérant de l'or et des minerais sur les plus gros astéroïdes. Attention car il y a de grandes distractions sur le chemin, alors utilisez les téléporteurs et plantez des bombes si vous vous retrouvez coincé.

title: Rabbit Samurai
description: Rabbit Samurai is on a big adventure to help his Sensei. Your goal is to find all mice and rescue them from the wolf's lair. Use the rope and sticking grappling hook to fly over the land. Launch yourself from the ninja cannon, collect all carrots and find hidden crystals. Avoid dangerous spikes!

title: Candy Bubble
description:
Amazing candy bubble buster game comes, it's the best Bubble
Shooter with amazing effects! Your goal is to match groups of three or more same-colored candy bubbles to clear the playing field; use the least small ball to end level.
Use the superb technique to break in one fell swoop, and experience the happiness of success!

title: ONE Card Game
description: Le jeu amusant et passionnant ONE vous manque ? Ou bien peut-être vous n’avez pas joué à ce jeu merveilleux auparavant ? Alors allez-y, sélectionnez un personnage et participez à des batailles amicales remarquables. Vous aurez une atmosphère parfaite de jeu, des règles détaillées, une gestion facile et plusieurs adversaires intéressants qui sont prêts à vous tenir compagnie à tout moment.

title: My Golf
description: Do you like golf? Try one shot hole in My Golf, unlock new levels and new balls by completing the world with all the stars...

title: Spear Toss Challenge
description: How far can you throw a spear?

title: Towerland
description:
Towerland is a top-down shooter with game mechanics inspired by the famous Binding of Isaac.
Features:
-Dozen of monsters
-Unlockable Powerups
-3 Different game modes
-3 Bosses

GAME CONTROLS

Keyboard:

WASD to move

Arrow Keys to Shoot

P to Pause the game

Gamepad:

Left Analog / D-pad Move

Right Analog / XYBA to Shoot

Start/Menu to Pause the game

title: Soldiers Fury
description: C'est la guerre ! Et en tant que soldat d'élite, vous avez des missions à accomplir ! Foncez, récupérez des armes et des bonus, et tirez sur tous les ennemis en tentant de survivre ! Améliorez votre arsenal et laissez libre cours à votre fureur ! Les soldats ennemis ne cessent d'arriver par vagues, mais vous pouvez utiliser votre environnement.

title: Sweet Monsters
description: Sweet Monsters est un jeu de Parkour en 2d qui vous fera courir et sauter des tonnes d'obstacles pour déguster des friandises. Le but n'est pas forcément d'aller le plus loin possible, car plus vous mangerez, plus vous ferez de combos et boosterez votre score pour obtenir des récompenses. Plus vous jouerez, plus la difficulté augmentera. Etes-vous prêt à relever le défi?

title: Hit Master
description: Are you ready to become a hero, spy, and legend? Solve puzzling challenges, show off your deadly accuracy and take aim at the enemies. Come experience the shooting phenomenon.

title: Perfect Car Parking
description:
Perfect Car Parking game created specially for whom wants to park car very carefully. 

Are you annoyed by all the similar parking games, and lack of high quality graphics and uniqueness? Are you looking forward to have a new car parking to park your vehicle as much as you want? We know you are here with a hope to find a game that suits you perfectly.

title: Rope Draw
description: Rope draw is a puzzle game in wich you will push ropes to make new arrangements with them. Your objective is to copy the arrangement that will appear above. If needed, there is a hint button that will show you the first moves. There are 120 different levels and the 'Fun' mode (unlocked after beating level 40), in which you can insert new ropes or even push them as you wish.

title: AirSpace2
description: Bienvenue dans Airspace, passez tous les astéroïdes sans détruire votre vaisseau, marquez des points en prenant toutes les sphères bleues, qu'attendez-vous ?? Allez jouer à Airspace maintenant et le plaisir sera garanti !!!!

title: Design My Home Makeover
description: Home Design est une passion, et si vous voulez transformer les rêves en réalité en aidant les familles chanceuses à concevoir une maison de rêve. Ce jeu de conception de maison - Dream House Makeover est un gameplay parfait avec un mode hors ligne de plaisir relaxant sans fin pour transformer des maisons obsolètes en un magnifique manoir familial. Vous pouvez redessiner un beau manoir en rénovant la maison et en la relookant en concevant et en restaurant pour concevoir et décorer ma maison de chacun de vos clients.

title: Gems Swipe
description: gems swipe is an html5 match 3 game, match gems and execute and get the highest score

title: Infinity
description: Welcome to Infinity, you control your character, avoid the red apples and collect the yellow ones to accumulate points, what are you waiting for, go now to play Infinity and the fun is guaranteed !!!!!

title: Ninja in Cape
description:
Are you ready for adventure with the ninja in cape?
A journey full of action and adrenaline awaits you!
There are 20 adventurous levels for you to play without breathing.
You have weapons that you can use against enemies.
Let's start the adventure now and complete the levels!

title: Retro Basketball
description:
Retro Basketball a fun sport game to play on.
This basket ball game gives always fun to play.
This is the game just to throw as many balls as you can and achieve high score.
Aim the ball exactly in the basket and achive goal.

title: Sea Rush
description: Utilisez votre imagination et découvrez ce que renferme l'océan. Sauvez tous les poissons dispersés à travers les niveaux et admirez toutes leurs belles couleurs.

title: Mad Mad Unicorn
description:
Mad Mad Unicorn is a game about a nasty flying unicorn who is out for blood!
Help him in is hell race against poor and defenceless birds!
But the humankind won't let this evil unicorn do whatever he wants: they will try to shoot him down with powerful misseles launched from any direction!
Maybe a magic carrot will give him the power to whitstand those deadly weapons...

FEATURES:
- One endless sky level with increasing difficulty
- 10 artworks to unlock
- Achievements
- A crazy flying unicorn
- Misseles, explosive birds, and other funny visual effects
- One Touch game controls.

title: FireBlob Winter
description:
Sequel to FireBlob, now with more levels and detail, better graphics, new puzzles, speedrun mode, and a final boss battle!

FireBlob is a Platform-Puzzle game where you command a small fireball in order to reach and ignite a wood fire; use the ball's heat abilities to melt the ice or use some level objects to help her to complete his task.

title: Tic Tac Toe HTML5
description: Retrouvez le célèbre "Morpion" en version HTML5 et profitez de nouveau modes de jeu en 3X3, 5X5 et même 7X7 où vous devrez remplir 4 cases au lieu de 3!

title: Superstar Kitty Fashion Award
description: Express your fashion and unique style to transform your little kitty in real beauty like a superstar in this amazing Superstar Kitty Fashion Award game with new hairstyles and fabulous makeover. Start with a spa treatment for a lovely facial and make her skin smooth, shinny, and glowing to look good at the award show.

title: 2048 Hex Chain Merge
description: 248 merge is an amazing block merge game.

title: Bike Mania 3 On Ice
description: Slip and slide your way through 20 levels of classic Bike Mania action! Frustration, adrenaline and the potential for a broken keyboard all await you as you take on the original and the best bike trail game of all time!

title: 456 impostor
description:
You are astronaut number "456" trying to survive in space. Your only solution is to destroy the men in the red suits. you have to jump on them and crush them to destroy them. destroy them and reach the final level. every 10 levels there is an endless run and men in red suits you have to kill.

How to Play
WASD + Mobile Touch Control

title: Brick Breaker Retro
description:
Welcome to the Brick Breaker Retro. If you like breaking bricks, this is your game. Will you be able to overcome all the levels? What about getting the highest score?

Every time you pass four levels, you can unlock the next ones and continue from there, although you can also start from the beginning to obtain a higher score.

title: Soccer Heroes
description:
Show all your skill in this football game. Choose your dream team and get into the fast-paced football action where you control um jogador. You can score goals with just a swipe of your finger or mouse. You are in charge of both the offense and the defense in this game, so you have to be quick to gain the upper hand.

Instructions:
Touch and drag your player to move.
Use your player to attack and defend the goal.

title: Broom
description: Broom est un jeu de course en pixel art qui vous fera traverser une autoroute sans fin. Utilisez vos super réflexes à bon escient pour exploser votre high score. Plongez dans un univers minimaliste et hyper arcade, et confrontez-vous à une difficulté de jeu très élevée!

title: Noob vs Stickman Zombies
description: Noob vs Stickman Zombies un matin d'été tranquille, alors que Noob dormait encore doucement dans sa cabane confortable, quelqu'un a allumé une musique assourdissante qui a fait trembler toute la maison. Quand il est sorti, il a découvert que juste à côté de lui, un groupe de Stickmen organisait une soirée dansante féroce, comme s'il essayait exprès de l'ennuyer. Dans un accès de rage, Noob retira son arc du mur pour venger sa journée gâchée et instruire tous ceux qui osaient troubler sa tranquillité ! "Noob vs Stickman Zombies" est un jeu d'arcade amusant avec une histoire intéressante dans laquelle vous devez donner une leçon aux voisins ennuyeux !

title: Glauron: dragon tales
description: Glauron, le premier né du clan des Dragons Ailés, s'est finalement échappé de sa prison dans laquelle il était retenu depuis 500 ans! Bien sûr il souhaite se venger et vous allez pouvoir l'aider en répandant chaos et désolation parmi les citoyens innocents...mais méfiez-vous car ces derniers sont armés et tenteront de se défendre!

title: Zombie Invasion
description: Plongez dans Zombie Invasion, le jeu de survie par excellence. Survivez à la horde zombie aussi longtemps que vous le pouvez et empêchez-les de traverser le pont. A chaque zombie qui passe entre les mailles de votre défense, vous perdez des points d'énergie. Prenez soin de ne pas blesser les survivants et éliminez tous les zombies!

title: Monster Popsy Dolls
description: Rencontrez un monstre incroyable-popsy. Ces jouets sont à la fois beaux et terribles! Choisissez parmi une variété de coiffures et de tenues pour créer votre propre poupée unique. Utilisez vos compétences de maquilleur pour choisir le bon maquillage pour votre popsy. Essayez des robes, des hauts, des vestes en cuir, des bottes et des bijoux amusants.

title: Clash of Kingdom
description:
Clash of Kingdom is a free online game featuring a war among kingdoms. Now, it’s not just the fun games on the computer that you can enjoy completely free 
If you are looking for an amazing game to play this weekend, I can highly recommend Clash of Kingdom. This game is wonderful and all types of people can enjoy it, rich or poor, beginner or the most experienced gamer out there.

title: Ant Maze
description: A leading ant must find his way home, for that he must eliminate the enemy blue ants, but he is not alone, he has allies to turn to to be stronger

title: Brazil Cup 2014
description: Embarquez pour la Coupe du Monde 2014 grâce à "Brazil Cup 2014", un des meilleurs jeux de football disponible sur le web.

title: Trimat
description: Trimat is a video game set in space with some levels. Avoid lasers, bombs, lava and cannonballs and travel the vastness of the galaxy!

title: Football Champ 3D
description: Football Champ 3D is the best football and matchless combination for footballlovers. Enjoy this fantasy football game!

title: Bowmastery - Zombies!
description: Bowmastery zombies is a fascinating game that will give a lot of pleasure to children and adults. Your job is to kill terrible zombies. You have a bow and arrows, but only on the first level you can directly shoot your opponents. At other levels, obstacles will arise between the hero and the zombies. Think where you can shoot to win.

title: Run Rabbit Run
description:
Imagine you are a cute blue bunny and you have to reach the guard at the end of each level! Reach the guards and join the army in the latest episode and defeat enemies and monsters!   

How to Play?
WASD & Mobile Touch Control (Double Jump Available)

title: Snake Brawl
description:
Swipe your finger to guide a snake of balls and break the bricks on SNake Brawl!
Try to break as many bricks as possible and increase your score.
Get additional balls and make the biggest snake ever!
Very easy to play but very hard to reach high scores!

title: Mandala Coloring Book
description: Détendez-vous tout en coloriant de belles images. Coloriez-les selon vos goûts. Tout ce que vous avez à faire, c'est laisser libre cours à votre imagination et colorier tout ce que vous aimez. Essayez de créer une œuvre d'art à couper le souffle.

title: Open TTD
description:
OpenTTD is a business simulation game in which players try to earn money by transporting passengers and freight via road, rail, water and air. It is an open-source remake and expansion of the 1994 Chris Sawyer video game Transport Tycoon Deluxe. 

To start building a transport empire, the player must construct transport routes, consisting of stations near industries or towns, and in the case of trains or road vehicles, near physical routes. One transport route can utilize several different forms of transport, e.g. truck→ship→train. The player's company and the individual stations each have ratings that depend largely on their efficiency at moving goods from one stations to the other. A station with high ratings may attract more goods.

title: Space War
description: Space War est un jeu unique et innovant en son genre, en effet en plus de présenter une version classique du "Space Shooter", il dispose d'un mode complètement innovant dans lequel vous devrez utiliser le microphone pour tirer sur les ennemis, le jeu peut être joué à la fois sur ordinateur et sur mobile, qu'attendez-vous ? Jouez à Space War maintenant !

title: Princess Kawaii Swimwear
description: La saison de baignade est ouverte! Les princesses vont à la plage. Quel est le vêtement le plus chaud sur la plage? Maillot de bain, bien sûr! Il suffit de regarder cette nouvelle collection de maillots de bain kawaii mignons: il y a suffisamment de tenues pour satisfaire même la princesse la plus maussade. La couleur délicate-bleu, rose, tons pastel-soulignera la sophistication de n'importe quelle fille. Choisissez votre maillot de bain princesse kawaii et détendez-vous avec style!

title: Jelly Bomb
description: Jelly Bomb has spread all over your kitchen tables! You can get rid of it by dripping it with a jelly remover, but watch out: there are only a few drops left, you will have to use them wisely to ensure the perfect splashing chain reaction!

title: Jump Bottle
description: Bouteille Flip - Jeu de défi de saut. Vous devez simplement sauter! Affrontez des joueurs du monde entier !

title: Fox Adventurer
description: Play Fox Adventurer and help Mr. Fox in his magical adventure.. Switch between day and night to choose the right way to finish level. Create stone clones to jump higher and collect green gems.

title: Tic Tac Toe Multiplayer
description:
Ultimate Tic Tac Toe is a HTML5 Board Game. 
Enjoy this nice version of the classic Tic Tac Toe Game. 3 Game’s Mode: 
- Multiplayer mode 
- Play against the pc 
- Challenge a friend playing on the same device

title: Unblock That
description: Unblock That est un jeu de casse-têtes simple et addictif. Le but est de faire sortir le bloc rouge du plateau de jeu en faisant glisser les autres blocs qui sont sur le chemin. Faites-le avec le moins de coups possible. Le jeu comprend 4 niveaux de difficulté allant de Débutant à Expert. Unblock That peut vous aider à entraîner votre cerveau et à garder un esprit aiguisé au quotidien.

title: Fancy Diver
description: Votre but est d'aider tous les plongeurs à remonter jusqu'en haut de l'écran avant que leur oxygène soit à zéro. Touchez les groupes de coraux de couleur similaire (3 ou plus) de façon à les faire disparaitre. Faites disparaitres de grands groupes de coraux de manière à gagner des mines spéciales et des power-ups!

title: Kids: Cute Pairs
description: Laissez vos enfants jouer à un jeu de concentration traditionnel. Il y a trois difficultés différentes, chacune avec ses propres images incluant des fruits et des légumes, des instruments de musique et des animaux. C'est un jeu stimulant pour les enfants de tout âge. Il comprend aussi un mode Deux joueurs pour vous permettre de jouer ensemble !

title: Kobadoo Emojis
description:
Kobadoo Emojis is a browser game that trains your brain by memorizing funny emojis in the right order.

When you play Kobadoo Emojis you are actively using your working memory. Several scientific studies suggest that training of working memory has beneficial effects and can increase your cognitive functions.

title: Mahjong Sweet Easter
description: Easter eggs and candies, what could be better? Celebrate easter with our new game! Match as many tiles as you can before time is up and try to deal with "gravity"!

title: Color Blocks
description: Color Blocks is easy to play and a pleasurable game for all ages! Simply drag the blocks and fill up all colored grids. Once you start, you will definitely be hooked: this 3D-style game awaits you!

title: Barbarian Run
description: barbarian run is a retro endless run game, run and kill monster with jump and collecting coins to get a lot of scores

title: Jet Strike
description: Jet Strike is the super arcade casual game everyone is playing right now. Enjoy!

title: Smash the Flies
description:
This is a cool, easy, and fun to play, endless game.
Tap or Click on the Flies with your fingers to smash them, before they leave the screen.
But don't tap the red one, or you finish the game! Be fast and quick to smash all of them and achieve high scores.

title: Ocean Kids Back to School
description: Welcome to Ocean Kids Back to school. It’s back to school time for these Kids. Can you help them get ready for their first day of classes? They’ll need to pick some cool outfits, new hairstyles, accessories, and school supplies too in this online dress-up and design game for girls. After you’re all done, help them to repair their vespa. Play and have fun!

title: GS
description: Easy and simple game, you have to pass two levels to be able to catch all the birds and fly them within a time limit

title: Urban Sniper Multiplayer 2
description: Urban Sniper Multiplayer 2 features ultimate sniper warfare in grand city, use different sniper rifles to shoot rival players across vast highly detailed map and try to get the highest amount of frags in order to win.

title: Shadobirds
description:
Don't download this game! it's too hard for you! You won't complete this game! Never! Trust me, I programmed this, I know what I'm saying. I literally lost the best part of my life trying to beat it. I made it at last, but the price was too high! I lost everything I love to beat it, and now I'm alone and lonely, but at least I can say "I completed Shadobirds". Can you say the same?
FEATURING:
20 Levels full of obstacles
Birds
Black Shadows
Other Birds
Nest
Obstacles
and when you think you are done... More obstacles!
Enjoy... if you can

title: BlueGuy Escape
description: blue guy escape is an adventure html5 retro game, run collect score by eating many fruits and avoid obstacles by flipping up and down

title: Fruit Clicker
description: A game about collecting as much FruitCoins as you can. The FruitCoins can be used to purchase upgrades at the store. Play this game now and try to unlock the secret reward.

title: FlashCount
description: Guess how many red dots appear disappear from the screen

title: Olympian Mahjong
description: Match identical sport tiles to remove them from the playing field. All mahjong tiles represent kinds of winter sports that will be played at the Olympic Winter Games in Beijing 2022.

title: Cowboy's Shooter
description: Cowboy's Shooter est un jeu qui se déroule dans l'ouest antique. Œil! De nombreux bandits voudront votre prime, tuez-les tous mais faites attention aux tirs ! La charge est assez lente, alors choisissez le bon moment pour charger ! Jouez à Cowboy's Shootooter sur votre ordinateur, smartphone ou tablette ! De nouvelles armes sortiront chaque mois, alors revenez de temps en temps ! Qu'est-ce que tu attends? Plongez dans le jeu !

title: Dark Chess
description:
It is a very interesting chess, it is using Chinese Chess to play but the game rule is very different.

Only higher level chess can eat lower level chess, if all of your chesses are eaten or you cannot move any chess. You will loss.

title: Domino Multiplayer
description:
Domino Multiplayer is a HTML5 Board Game. 
Enjoy this stylish version of the classic Domino Game. 
3 Game’s Mode: 
- Multiplayer mode 
- Play against the pc 
- Challenge a friend playing on the same device

title: Dots Attack
description: Switch color dot! Put your record in this addictive arcade!

title: Fast Finders IO
description: Find colored shape of a requested type faster than your opponents!

title: Squid Game Survival Challenge
description:
Welcome to the opportunity of a lifetime. Just try to give your best at the squid game challenge.
Are you short on money?
You can earn 45.6 Billion Won just by sticking to fair play. There is only one rule, don’t get eliminated.
Remember our card? Call us now. Challenge for our childish game event, it will be fun, but the stakes are deadly.

title: Tap Double-Tap REMAKE!
description: A simple video game in which you will have to send the central ball to the half screen of the correct color. You will have to tap once to send the ball to the left, to send the ball to the right instead, you will have to tap it twice!

title: East Runner
description:
Help the prince to run faster than everyone! Run as far as you can. Collect coins and buy things in the store. Become the best runner of the East!
Endless game with great graphics to keep you playing.
Run without hitting obstacles in the eastern safari.

title: Space Cord
description: Explore the space and collect all trophies through its energy platforms avoiding dangerous traps on your way! Try to hold on as long as possible in a space race!

title: BigBoom
description: Reach more and more objectives increase the mines

title: Fairy Wingerella
description: Wingerella is a fairy girl that is going to become the most cool and powerful fairy in the world.

title: Neon Block
description: A fun casual game with a neon theme. try to pass all levels with the least amount of deaths possible. Challenge your friends.

title: Red and Green Color Rain
description:
Crazy sharp wheels and diamonds you need to collect welcome you in 6 games of the red and green series. collect diamonds, overcome obstacles and go to the next level!

How to Play?
WASD and Arrow Keys - Mobile Touch

title: Road Builder Simulator
description: Using heavy machinery like heavy excavator, crane, road roller and a dumper truck in this City Road Construction 2020, learn and build your city with excellent fine-tuned construction simulation. This is a fun to construct like a real builder with hydraulic controls that provides an excellent driving view. Know inside story of road construction with the use of heavy machinery. Enjoy heavy machinery simulator to repair and construct new roads

title: Squid Game 3D Survival Squad
description:
Do you want that Treasure in Squid Game ? You have to be brave enough to take it.

Squid Game 456 : Survival Challenge Game is the thrilling and fascinating 3D traditional simulator Squid Game K- games that are based on famous childhood Korean Squid Game, this game promises to bring you the most realistic experience of the main character - Player 456.

🚨 HOW TO PLAY SQUID GAME 🚨
- Green Light, Red Light: The two rule that you have to keep in mind is "Stop when red and Run when green"
- Dalgona Challenge: Break the candy with to come out with different shape like: star, umbrella, circle,...
- Tug of War: Use your strength to win against the other group. Remember only 50% of you will survive in this game
- Marble Rolling: Play marbles in the right hole in one shot, don't let rival win this game
- Glass Stepping Stone: Choose the right glass stone so that your fate wont end regretfully
- More and More

Get ready to challenge these games:
- Red light Green light
- Candy carving
- Tug of war
- Glass bridge
- Marble playground
- Ddakji Paper flip

title: Touchme
description: Welcome to Touch Me, have fun accumulating points by touching the yellow ball and avoiding the yellow blue and white ones including bats, what are you waiting for ??? Go play Touch me now and the fun will be guaranteed !!!!!!

title: Two x2
description:
A very addicting Puzzle Game, similar to the popular 2048 game, but with a different logic. Connect the numbers and don’t run out of moves! Make lines connecting as many numbered points as possible. The longer is the line, the more points you get. Every time you connect numbers, you get a new doubled number.
Challenge your friends, play it right now!

title: Simply Breakout
description:
This is the best Brick Breaker that everyone can play, extremely simple, but really fun.
There are many elements and object, various levels and easy game controls.

title: Zombie Strike 2
description: You are trapped in a farm crowded with zombies and your mission is to survive five waves of zombies with increasing difficulty, use big arsenal of weapons to shoot hordes of incoming zombies and try to survive in order to successfully complete your mission.

title: Alien Hunter Remastered
description: alien hunter remastered is an html5 platformer game, explore levels earn coins and destroy aliens

title: Silent Asylum
description: You are trapped in silent asylum crowded with scary monsters and your mission is to shoot your way through dark corridors and find all keys to unlock the exit.

title: Apples
description: Welcome to the apple game. only pick apples, be very careful not to get hit by the bullet, you have three chances to lose to get your high score

title: Merge Block Puzzle
Zoo Trivia
description: Il est temps de montrer votre connaissance des animaux ! Combien d'entre eux en connaissez-vous ? Pouvez-vous épeler les noms correctement ? Des dizaines d'animaux vous attendent. Des mammifères, chiens, chats, poissons, insectes et beaucoup plus ! C'est plus difficile que vous ne le pensez ! Mais ne vous inquiétez pas, vous pouvez toujours utiliser l'élégant système d'indices pour vous aider à surmonter les difficultés.

title: Exploder.io
description: Exploder is a game similar to the classic Bomberman but with a space theme. Players need to fight other players as well as monsters by planting bombs and running away from attacks and explosions. Starting the game is pretty easy and straightforward; though, it is incredibly hard to master all the game tricks. All graphical game assets are pixel artwork to reflect on the original game. Battles in Exploder are very entertaining and challenging, with virtual coins and experience points as gratification! In the game shop, you can use the coins to upgrade your character's appearance by buying new skins and other aspects.

title: Retro Speed
description: Feel the thrill of high speed racing in Retro Speed. It is an arcade racing game in which the speed of your car constantly increases as you keep collecting coins. Overtake as many cars as possible and emerge as the leader. Don't miss playing this highly addictive and fun game.

title: M3 Power 3D City Racing
description: 7 different bmw m3 survival games. be the last and be the first to achieve victory collect points you own the best car of the day! Are you ready to be the winner of m3 power 3d city racing?

title: Crazy Switch Color
description:
Faites sauter prudemment la balle à travers chaque obstacle lorsqu'il est de la même couleur que la balle.
Attention de ne pas traverser la mauvaise couleur, sinon vous devrez recommencer.

title: Head Ball Hyper Casual Game
description:

description:
Fruit Smash Master Fruit Cutter is a fun and challenging fruit slicing game.    
fruit smashing is an essential skill for cooking and eating. By slicing fruit, you can make it easier to get the most out of your fruits by making them more accessible and tasty. Fruit Smash Master offers a unique and challenging experience that will have you coming back for more! 
 
The objective of the game is to cut as many pieces from a fruit as possible in the shortest time. The player can use different fruits, but care should be taken that they are not too heavy or too thin so that they do not break during cutting. The fruit slices can be set on different surfaces such as a desk, table, or floor and there are several levels of difficulty available for players to increase their chances of winning.

title: Superstar Family Dress Up Game
description:
Créez des tenues de luxe et des looks incroyables pour une famille superstar de 4 splendides modèles virtuels sur le même écran ! Chaque personnage a sa propre garde-robe avec plus de 200 articles vestimentaires, maquillage et accessoires. Ajoutez-y des animaux de compagnie mignons, des feux d’artifice et divers autocollants cool pour obtenir la photo finale, prête pour l'album photo. Prenez une capture d'écran en appuyant sur le bouton "Caméra" dans le jeu et partagez-la en ligne avec vos amis et votre famille pour montrer vos talents de fashionista.

Choisissez l’un des 8 fonds qui définissent le contexte : shopping dans une rue commerçante du centre-ville, défilé sur le tapis rouge, séance photo en studio, maison de maître (intérieure et extérieure), salon de château, pique-nique dans le parc et un palais oriental. 

Pour chaque poupée, il existe un large éventail de vêtements chic et d'options de maquillage à la mode. Vous pouvez littéralement tout personnaliser : de la forme des yeux et de la couleur de l'iris aux robes, en passant par des accessoires glam, comme des montres suisses ou des colliers en or. Qui sont ces poupées : stars de cinéma, célèbres mannequins d’une couverture de magazine glam, célébrités sur Internet, prince et princesse, acteurs et actrices de théâtre, hommes et femmes d'affaires fortunés ou autres ? Vous décidez en créant une tenue appropriée, en choisissant une coiffure et en passant l’image en revue avec des accessoires stylés. Par exemple, la maman pourrait être un top model, le papa un acteur, et les enfants se rendent chacun dans une école privée d'élite avec leur chauffeur personnel et un garde du corps.

Pour les joueurs musulmans, une sélection de hijabs, de robes musulmanes et de costumes masculins est proposée.

Téléchargez et jouez à plus de nos jeux de coiffure de poupée et de relooking de jeunes filles pour Android en appuyant sur le bouton "Plus de jeux" dans le jeu. Toutes nos applications sont entièrement gratuites, sans achats intégrés ni verrous. C'est une véritable trouvaille pour les jeunes fashionistas à la recherche de simulateurs d'habillage et de maquillage de haute qualité. Nous publions fréquemment de nouvelles applis de relooking, de cosplay et de salon de beauté, alors restez avec nous !

🎰🎮🖲️🕹️🔮
People who are looking for lightweight fun games will enjoy this Ball Cannon Shooting Game. In case you want an easy-to-understand game with a friendly interface, or if you want a game with no extra hassles after installation. Then this cannon ball game has everything you are looking for.

Despite all this, the best part of this cannon ball blast is that it’s free and you don’t need any internet connection to play it. That means you can play this cannon ball blast when you want and wherever you want.

<h2>🔮Gameplay of this Ball Cannon Shooting Game <h2/>
🎰🎮🖲️🕹️🔮
The gameplay of this shoot cannon game is so simple that even kids can easily play this on their own. At the beginning of the game, you will have a cannon that shoots color balls. There is also a hitting point on the top of the game screen. Your job is to hit that point using the cannon balls. If you tap once, the cannon shoots one ball; if you keep tapping continuously, it will shoot several balls. But there are some moving obstacles between the cannon and the hitting points. You have to hit the point without hitting the obstacles. If you accidentally hit the obstacle, you will lose the game and have to start it all over again. This cannon game seems so easy at the beginning, but as you progress in the game, it will become more challenging. So we call it easy to play but hard to master.

When 3-5 golden books fall out, the bonus game begins. It is no different from the usual one, with the only difference that the next 10 spins will be completely free. Thus, the player can significantly increase his capital without any risks. Well, in the event that 3-5 golden books fall out on the reels again during the bonus game, then 10 more are added to the remaining number of free spins! By the way, if you have 4 books at once, then your winnings will increase 20 times, and if 5, then 200!

Chocos will continuously rise from below and then fall, and you must draw lines appropriately to ensure they follow your path! You have 3 lives if you fail to basket. It's time for some serious reflexes with this challenging puzzle game as it does or die! But don't worry, no need to waste time on boring orthodox games anymore when there are so many fun ones out there like this one that tests your skills and hunger of a baby girl at the same time? The choco balls are coming for you to feel happy! Find the ball for the little girl to feel happy! It doesn't matter what kind of line you draw; it needs to be just a line that can trace your path and make it into all three baskets before time runs out. The goal of this puzzle isn't just about putting together the picture; rather kids must find all nine animals hidden among five sets around four levels by asking themselves questions such as "Have I seen any birds?", and then search until finding no other matching responses before answering them correctly so they can move onto next level where more challenging tasks await...

"Adventure Bot" is a 2D platformer game set in a pixel art style world. Players control a robot named Bot, on a journey to explore and discover new areas. The game features challenging gameplay as players must navigate through various obstacles and enemies, using Bot's abilities to jump, run and attack to overcome them.

As players progress through the game, they will encounter a wide variety of obstacles and enemies, such as spikes, pits, and mechanized creatures. Players can also collect nuts and other items to buy ammos for Bot.

description: Fond of the rat race? It's time to grab some cheese. The rats are hungry! So make them grab those cheese right away!
