title: Paperly - Paper Plane Adventure
description:
Paperly: Paper Plane Adventure is an exciting game where you must fly a paper plane and reach your destination. Avoid any objects that will hinder your way, collect extra time and Quantum as you fly, accelerate your paper plane, and reach the finish. Gravity will be your best friend in your journey of exploration, and it will act as an engine for your paper plane, so make sure to make the best use of it. Diving down will give you more momentum, and going up will take momentum from your airplane. Take a wind boost and dash on the air like crazy!

Features

- Explore worlds: Dry Deserts, Tropical Forests, Ice Caves, etc.
- 11 unlockable paper planes
- 7 unlockable paper plane skins

title: Monster Truck Adventure Expedition
description:
Drive the awesome monster truck, watch out for chasms, explore new terrains like deserts, volcanoes, and islands

Mobile: Use buttons on the left side of the screen to rotate a monster truck, use gas to accelerate.
Keyboard: Press X to drive right, Z to drive backward. Use arrows to rotate your monster truck in the air.

title: Thor Treasury Viking Key Conquest
description:
Embark on an epic journey as a fearless Viking warrior delving into the depths of the underworld. Navigate through labyrinthine passages, encountering mythical creatures and overcoming challenges to collect ancient keys. keys unlocks a new levels of the underground realm, filled with treasure and mysteries waiting to be discovered

Keyboard users: Use the left and right arrows to move your hero, use the Z and X keys to rotate the screen. For mobile users, utilize the on-screen buttons

title: Joyful Ball Bounce Mushroom Magic Adventure
description:
Take control of a playful ball in this mobile platform game! Navigate through obstacles and defeat enemies to reach the charming 'little character with a mushroom on its head.' Collect funny little balls along the way to earn points and unlock achievements. Enjoy the charming graphics and festive music as you embark on this thrilling adventure!


For mobile: Use the buttons on the left side to move your red ball, and the button on the right side to jump. Press the jump button twice to jump higher.
For keyboard: Use the arrow keys to move, and press the up arrow key twice to jump higher.

title: Black Ball Star Chaser
description:
Roll the ball and collect the stars on the board, being careful not to fly out of the labyrinth
Keyboard: Use the left and right arrows to move your hero.
Mobile: Touch the left or right side of the screen to rotate the screen

title: CrocoBoy Run
description: crocoboy run is an html5 jump running game, run and jump to avoid the monsters and obstacles that come

title: Santa Super Adventure
description: Santa Super Adventure is an HTML5 endless run game, run and collect all the scattered prizes, be careful, avoid various obstacles and be the winner.

title: Bunny Adventure
description: bunny adventure is an html5 endless run game, run and get as many stars as possible, avoid obstacles and monsters

title: Bouncing Ball
description: bouncing ball is a html5 jumping ball game, touch the screen to run the jumping ball and avoid obstacles to reach the finish

title: Ninja Frog Adventure
description: frog adventure is an html5 platformer game, a frog adventure to find fruit and score, beat the enemy at each level and complete it

title: Smart Cup
description: smart cup is a filling a glass with water html5 game, hold and press the faucet turns on the water and it flows into the glass until it reaches the limit in the image

title: Car Driving Lesson
description: car driving lesson is an isometric arcade html5 game, control the car up and down avoid collisions and get the highest score

title: Christmas Bird Game's Mission
description:
In the game "Christmas Bird Game's Mission," you play as a little bird pilot traveling in a spaceship. Your mission is to reach the base located on the other side of the screen. But watch out! You have limited fuel, so you must manage it carefully.
You control the bird using the up arrow key on the keyboard, but remember, each ascent uses a lot of fuel. Try to carefully avoid obstacles such as beams, meteors, and other ships that can halt your journey.
Collect fuel and fly cautiously to reach the base. Will you be able to overcome cosmic challenges and reach your goal? It's time to begin the adventure!


For mobile devices: Use the left, up, and right arrows on the left side of the screen to control the character. For keyboards: Utilize the arrow keys on the keyboard; left for leftward movement, up to ascend, and right to move to the right

title: Cat-tastic Puzzle Challenge
description:
Unleash your inner cat detective! Piece together a purrfectly puzzling scene filled with feline friends. 
From playful antics to cozy naps, this jigsaw puzzle captures the essence of cats in all their glory. 
Can you bring the purrfect picture to life?

title: Rapid Pixie Puzzle Fun
description:
Help the pixies in their fruity frenzy! Rapid Pixie Puzzle Fun is a fast-paced bubble shooter where 
juicy fruits replace the bubbles. Match three or more of the same kind to clear the board and rack 
up points. Be quick and strategic, as new fruits fall at a rapid pace.
Can you keep up and become the ultimate fruit-matching champion?

title: Brain Puzzle Quest Bangkok Edition
description:
Immerse yourself in the bustling beauty of Bangkok with our cityscape Puzzle game! Piece together 
iconic landmarks like the Grand Palace and vibrant street markets. As you assemble the puzzle, feel 
the energy of this dynamic city come to life through intricate details and vivid colors. Experience 
the charm of Bangkok from the comfort of your own home!

title: Fruity Fortune Slot Frenzy
description:
Sink your teeth into juicy wins in Fruity Fortune Slot Frenzy! Spin the reels and match vibrant fruits to 
unleash a frenzy of fortune. Line up the winning combinations and watch your payouts grow. With every spin, 
a delicious taste of victory awaits! So, crank up the excitement and get ready to be swept away in this fruity 
jackpot adventure!

title: Mystic Maidens Puzzle
description:
Enter a whimsical world of enchantment with our Mystic Maidens Puzzle game! Piece together magical 
scenes featuring fairies, unicorns, and charming princesses. Delight in the joy of solving intricate puzzles 
while surrounded by vibrant colors and delightful characters. Unleash creativity and embark on a puzzle 
adventure that sparks imagination in every piece!

title: Park Safe
description:
Safe Park is an exciting game that tests your focus and timing.
The car moves automatically, and your task is to park it in a tight space at just the right moment! Be careful not to crash into other cars, or its game over.
This is a free, endless game that offers a fun challenge, but its not easy to master! Are you up for the challenge of becoming a safe parking expert?

title: Duo Match
description: Prepare yourself for a fresh and original matching pair game challenge! Your task is to match pairs of extra cute characters on the ground and pop them all! Each cleared level introduces new pairs to match. This cute matching game is designed to be so easy that anyone can play and enjoy it. Are you ready to dive into the world of adorable characters and test your matching skills?

title: Rally Championship
description:
Rally Championship is a fun classic 2D arcade racing game similar with the classic racing games of the 80s.
Play ten different circuits to race in a car that runs automatically; unlock two or more powerful cards that are hidden and discover other features while playing.
Use the turbo when you need an extra speed boost and set the best lap time.
The game shows colorful and detailed graphics and a nice sound effects you will enjoy.

title: Image To Word Match
description:
Welcome to our cool word matching game! In this game, you simply need to match the pictures to the correct words.
How To Play:
Its as easy as pie! Just use your mouse to click on a picture, then drag and drop it over the correct word.
If you get it right, youll see a message saying Well done! If you make a mistake, youll see an error message.
We offer two exciting game modes:

Easy: Play at your own pace without any stress. You can go back and forth in the game whenever you want, making it perfect for kids.

Normal: Challenge yourself with three lives. Match the pictures correctly to the words, or face a game over!

title: Color Fun For Kids
description:
Get on a vibrant journey with Color Fun For Kids! This delightful game offers a kaleidoscope of hues for young minds to explore.
Enter in a playful world of creativity as children immerse themselves in coloring activities with user-friendly numeric guides.
Unlock the joy of blending colors, fostering imagination, and enhancing fine motor skills.
Play now for an interactive and educational experience that makes learning colors a delightful adventure for your little ones!

title: Find The Lost Letter
description:
Welcome to our delightful letter matching game! Its simple and fun for everyone. Just follow these instructions:
HOW TO PLAY:
Touch one of the three letters on the right side of the screen.
Drag the selected letter over the missing box area. Release your finger to drop the letter into the missing area.
If the letter is correct, youll see a bonus message; otherwise, youll see an error message.
Dont worry about losing because its just a simple kids letter game. Plus, you can learn the correct names of objects and alphabet letters while playing.
Key Features:
- Over 60 objects
- High-resolution images
- Super cute graphics
-Amazing sound

title: Santa Match Games
description:
Thank you for providing the information about the game Challenging Track. This game sounds like a fun and engaging activity, suitable for players of all ages. In this game, you have to match the pictures to the correct words. Its really simple and intuitive… just use your mouse and click on a picture after drag n drop the picture over the correct Word! If you do right you see a message of well done if you are wrong you see an error message!
You have 2 Game Modes:
Easy: You can play freely without stress because you can go back and forth in the game when you want! Its really suitable for kids.
Normal: In this mode you have 3 lives

title: Happy Farm Animals
description: Designed especially for toddlers aged 1.5 to 5 years old, this engaging and educational game is a perfect tool for teaching your children the names and sounds of different farm animals. The game features large, vibrant images that make it easy for your childs small fingers to interact with them. While the game is designed to be intuitive, younger children may need some initial guidance and assistance from an adult. By playing this game, your child can learn about various farm animals while developing their fine motor skills and hand-eye coordination.

title: Car Wash For Kid
description: Work as a master car mechanic and wash dirty planes in the childrens auto garage plane wash repair game or car wash game where you must perform multiple tasks like car washing, car repair, and test driving the cars.

title: Coin Drop
description:
Play at Coin Drop and have fun with this entertaining puzzle game!
The goal of the game is to get the coin into the basket without letting it touch the ground! Try to complete all different 24 levels!
How to do this? Simply:
destroy the boxes and, using the principles of physics to roll the coin into the basket!
Coin Drop is simple and fun puzzle game for everyone!

title: Kids Hand Care
description:
Are you interested in becoming a great hand doctor? Embrace the opportunity to wear a stethoscope and exude professionalism with this engaging hand doctor game.
It offers a perfect blend of fun and educational experiences.
Dont miss out, grab it now!

title: Avoider
description: In Avoider you play the role of a bee lost in a quagmire, full of dangerous plants that can kill you with their poisonous thorns. Fly as long as you can in this endless wood, and make the highest score of all time!

title: Numberless
description: Numberless is an endless vertical shooter where you have to destroy an infinite horde of monsters that requires a certain number of hit to be destroyed. More the hit you need to kill a monster, more points you will earn once the monster is destroyed! But if a monster touches you is game over, so is better to do your math!

title: Jumper Bot
description: Jumperbot is a platformer game where you have to jump and avoid all the nasty flying fishes (for real?) moving around on screen. Avoid them at all cost, otherwise it will be game over! Remember you can jump how many times you want, even if you are midair!

title: Clock Head
description: Clockhead is a game about a weird clock that shrinks in the time if you do not catch the white glowing orbs on screen when the clock arm is overlapping them. Touch or click at right time, to earn points and restore the normal size of your head. If you wait to long the head will disappear and it will be game over.

title: Bunny Jump Plus
description: Bunny Jump catapults you into an epic vertical adventure! Get ready to jump, jump and jump some more as you try to reach heights you've never seen before! Take on the challenge and see how high you can go!

title: Worms Zone
description: Worms.Zone is online game with dynamic storyline and funny graphics. Start grow your worm right now. While trying to get the real anaconda, the small worm never stucks in one place – he is ready to bite everyone. However, there is a danger to be eaten by the more successful player.

title: BandyBall
description:
Play BandyBall and have fun dribbling with the balls that made football history.
Earn STARS by dribbling, unlock and redeem balls and shoes.
Each item provides additional bonuses to help you earn more and more STARS.

title: Xmas Pop It
description:
It's Christmas! so pop all bubbles on the fidget xmas toys!   
Merry Christmas and happy new year!

title: Animal Rush
description: Animal Rush is a fun game to play. Tap on the screen to change the direction of the animal or make it jump to avoid gaps. Collect diamonds along the way and unlock new animals to play. Don’t fall off the path or the game will be over.

title: Amazing Soccer
description:
Looking for an exciting football entertainment in your hands? Here is Amazing Soccer game!Swipe the ball to hit the targets and score.

There are 2 modes to play with colorful balls

Collect the stars to unlock new balls, environments, nets and goalkeepers. Improve your skills and become the best Football Striker the world has ever seen!

title: Right Time
description: In Right Time you have to shoot fast if you want to make points. You have to shoot the enemies when they are under your crosshair. Every time you hit a target you will make a point, but the next one will be faster. How long can you last without missinga a single hit?

title: Ketchme
description: The rules of Ketchme are the easiest: You do not have to do nothing more than click on the white character on screen, before the time runs out. Every time you catch it, another creature will spawn on screen, making harder to find your target.

title: Tao Tao
description: In Tao Tao you have to match the colors of the incoming monsters every time they spawn. Touch the screen to rotate the Tao-monsters, and match based on the incoming creature. As the time passes, the speed of the creatures increases, so be careful!

title: Bouncing Blobs
description: In Bouncing Blob you have to collect all the orbs that appear on the screen to increase your score. Avoid the blobbing enemies, but if you get hit you can always restore your health collecting the small black blob that spawn on the screen. You can also use your points to unlock new characters.

title: Jump Drop Shell
description: Jump Drop Shell est une action réflexe permettant de contrôler une personne pouvant se spécialiser dans les coquillages et les heures de sommeil. Vous pouvez garnir votre carpaccio d'un double sauté. Utilisez cette machine de manière scientifique et réfléchissez. Vous n'avez accès à aucun obstacle dans votre mode de vie dans un siège double pratique qui s'installe à tout moment dans votre coquille.

title: Clones
description: Clones vous contrôlez un personnage qui peut se cloner ! Mais vos clones ne sont pas que des copies régulières. Chaque fois que vous créez un clone, vous remontez dans le temps et votre clone copiera toutes les étapes que vous avez effectuées auparavant ! Vous pouvez utiliser ces doubles voyageant dans le temps pour appuyer sur des boutons, sauter sur des plates-formes et déverrouiller des portes.

title: Devil Level
description: Devil Level online est un jeu de plateforme avec une touche méchante. Le but est simple ; arrivez à la porte à la fin du niveau pour gagner, mais ce n'est pas aussi facile qu'il y paraît... Des trous peuvent apparaître de nulle part, des pointes peuvent bouger de manière inattendue et des plafonds peuvent vous tomber dessus pendant que vous avancez. les nombreux niveaux différents. Un faux pas et c'est la fin du jeu.

title: Money Rush
description:
Are you great at simple math? Or are you looking for interesting games about money? Amazing! This money game is just for you. Roll out your money roll, apply your knowledge of mathematics and choose the best gate to increase your amount and become a real owner of money! The more coins you collect, the higher your income will be.

Immerse yourself in the world of wealth and profit with "Money Rush". Adrenaline, big winnings and a real pleasure from the game are waiting for you. Start your journey to financial success right now!

title: 90 Degrees
description: Unleash your inner fun banter with 90 Degrees. Get an exclusive, exciting & unique gaming experience with just a tap! Catch a glimpse

title: Drawing Puzzle
description: Drawing Puzzle is a logic game. Use your finger or mouse to draw a path on the screen and guide the ball into the cup. This is amazing brain challenge for you.

title: Survival by Boat
description: Embark on an exciting sea adventure with our Boat Survival game! Explore the vast expanses of the ocean, discover mysterious islands and meet amazing characters in this exciting world of survival. Collect resources, fight monsters and create your own story in this unique journey. Get ready for incredible adventures and unexplored islands – your sea adventure begins right now!

title: Untwist Road
description: A feature of this game is the unique mechanics - you have to not only collect cylinders and avoid obstacles, but also roll out the road in front of you. Be ready for the challenge, because each level becomes more difficult and requires more skill.

title: ZigZag Glide
description:
Embark on a thrilling journey with ZigZag Glide! Guide your nimble ball through an endless array of zigzagging 
bars, skillfully maneuvering through gaps to score points. Master the art of precision as you navigate through 
increasingly challenging levels, each filled with dynamically placed barriers. 
Challenge your reflexes and concentration to achieve the highest score. With its addictive gameplay, 
vibrant graphics, and endless obstacles, ZigZag Glide promises an exhilarating experience for players of 
all ages.

Key Features:
Zigzag Challenge: Navigate the flappy ball through a zigzagging path, testing your reflexes and precision.
Endless Obstacles: Encounter an infinite number of successive bar pairs.
Score Mastery: Increase your score by successfully passing through gaps.

title: Maze Madness Adventure
description:
Embark on an epic journey with "Maze Madness Adventure," a maze-solving extravaganza! Navigate through a 
multitude of challenging levels, each designed to test your skills and intellect. Choose your preferred 
mode – conquer mazes at your pace in normal mode, race against time in the adrenaline-pumping timed mode, 
or navigate through the shadows in the intense darkness mode. 
With an abundance of levels and diverse challenges, hone your maze-solving abilities and strive for 
higher scores in this captivating and versatile gaming experience.

Key Features:

Varied Modes: Engage in normal, timed, and darkness modes.
Extensive Level Design: Explore a multitude of intricately designed levels
Score-driven Mastery: Aim for the highest scores by solving mazes efficiently.

title: FliperX
description: The Flipper

title: MicrobX
description: Welcome to the MicrobX game, you have to capture all the microbes in the shortest time possible, the record remains recorded so you can try again in less time

title: Merge Challenge
description: A classic 2048 style merge game, try to complete the game in this challenge.

title: Short Path Run 3d Fun
description:
Short Path fun 3d Run is challenging game with 100+ levels. Make race with other users.
Race against opponents, and stack up all the floorboards you can pick up along the way!
If you're clever enough, get out of the way and build bridges and take shortcuts to get to the finish line before everyone else!

Cheating has never been so stylish!

Simple gameplay with efficient and easy to learn controls.

title: Army Stick
description: Army Stick is an HTML5 arcade game, pull the stick and adjust the timing to a long or short distance from the ground

title: Super Dice
description: super dice is an html5 arcade game, roll the dice to the same color and get a score

title: Ninja Endless Run
description: Ninja Endless Run is an HTML5 arcade game, run and jump, avoid obstacles, get as many coins as possible and get big prizes at the end of the journey

title: Candy Super Match
description: Switch and match the candies and get the highest score to be the winner

title: Balloon Crack
description: Ballon Crack is an HTML5 arcade game, pop as many balloons as possible and get a score

title: Zombie Attack Shooter
description: zombie attack shooter is an html5 arcade shooting game, zombies attack shoot them and get the coins that come, use special powers to destroy them

title: Rick
description: Welcome to the Dick game 5 levels to overcome to win, Good luck

title: Northern Lights - The Secret of the Forest
description:
A new hit for fans of the Connect 3 genre!

The Scientist Cat is already hiding items throughout the mysterious forest so you can enjoy finding things and earn as many emeralds as possible. The cat is happy to have new guests!

Ivan Tsarevich is already chopping wood to build a hut and is waiting for your help. But don't worry! You don’t have to wield an ax: you just need to connect things three at a time, and this way you will build a large tower and even be able to plant a beautiful garden with apple trees on the site. And the apples there are red and liquid! By the way, for combining three fruits in the game they also give a reward.

Marya Morevna is already preparing interesting riddles and puzzles and is looking forward to treasure hunting with you. But the game won't be too difficult: Marya loves to arrange things in threes and will be happy to help you overcome all the obstacles!

title: Idle Military Base. Army Tycoon
description: Do you want to become a military tycoon, build your own military base and experience a real military simulator? A military base with nothing on it will fall under your control. Your mission is to expand it! Create the largest military base with equipment!

title: Physical Balls 2048
description:
Your task is to merge the same balls. When two balls with the same number, color and size collide, they merge into one ball with a larger number. The goal is to reach as many numbers as possible by combining the balls. 
The physics in this game adds an extra level of difficulty. The balls move and bounce realistically. As you progress through the levels, the gameplay becomes more complex, new types of balls and obstacles are added to it. 
The graphics in this game are amazing, with bright colors and smooth animations that bring the physical balls to life. 
This physical ball game is perfect for both regular players and puzzle lovers. So what are you waiting for? Start the game right now and start merging these balls!

title: Legend of the Isles. The Hero's Path
description: Welcome to the exciting world of island battles, where you will play the role of a brave traveler exploring mysterious islands full of dangers and secrets. You will embark on an epic journey across the ocean, mastering the art of combat and strategy to become a true ruler of the archipelago.

title: Egg Hunt Mania
description: Préparez votre panier et sauvez tous les œufs que vous pouvez d'un terrible destin. Veillez à vider un panier plein dans le magasin. Attention au quota d'œufs qui augmente chaque jour !

title: Lucky Vegas Slots
description: Vous voulez vivre l'expérience de Vegas ? Essayez toutes les différentes machines à sous chanceuses et sentez l'excitation de toucher le jackpot sur votre machine préférée !

title: Color Runner
description: In Color Runner you are a stylized man running through an endless row of colored cubes where you have to match the same color of the cube you are running through. Try to run as long as you can without go wrong with the colors!

title: Frog Byte
description:
Frogbyte is a game about a hungry toad sitting on a leaf that wants to eat all the flies flying through its swamp. Try to catch as many bugs as you can avoiding the bombs, otherwise it will be game over!
Make the best score and share it with your friends!

title: Feeding Fish
description: In Feeding Fish you are a little fish who wants to eat all the worm in the ocean. Nobody can stop you, but you are not the only fish in the sea: you will have to avoid the vicious sharks that wander in the deepest ocean, looking for a nice little fish to eat!

title: Bad Drawings Memory Game
description: Bad Drawings Memory Game is a classic memory game but with a twist: in this game you won't find any good drawings to memorize! Instead, you will find ugly handmade drawings that look like they came out from hell! You have 3 different difficulty level to try out in this game.

title: Within the Borders
description: In Within the Borders you have to collect the white glowing orbs without leaving the track. If you get out from the black line it will be game over. To turn you have to touch the screen at the right moment. Be careful, because every time you collect a new orb, the players moves faster and faster!

title: They Fall
description: In "They Fall" the rules are simple: you have to collect as many  Purple orbs as you can avoiding the falling rotating saw. You can survive to 3 hits before dying. You can recover your health if you avoid the saws for long enough. Try your best and make the highest score!

title: Shadow Shooter
description: In Shadow Shooter you have to face an assault from an army of shadows. To destroy the shadows you have to shoot them with using bullets of the same colors of the nasty shadows! As you proceed in the game, the shadows spawning rate will increase. Will you be fast enough?

title: Flappy Blob
description: Flappy Blob is a reinterpretation of the famous Flappy Bird. In this game you are a flying pseudo-bat that has to fly through a flock of smoky clouds. To fly you have to touch the screen. If you don't, the bats will falls and you will die. If you touch the cloud you lose. Try to survive as long as you can in this endless flying game.

title: Horror Face Shooter
description: In Horror Face Shooter a gang of horrible monsters want to assault you. To defend yourself you have your super powerful laser beam, but it requires some time to get reloaded, so you have to shoot wisely, otherwise the wicked horror face will get you!

title: No Mice in the Kitchen
description: In No Mice in the Kitchen only the chicken are allowed to come in! You have to kill all the mice that will try to deceive you, hiding between the birds. No one want to eat a mouse right? So kill them! But be careful because if you kill too many chicken by mistake you will be fired! Game over!

title: Alien Bouncing
description: Alien Bouncing is a game about quick reflexes and right timing. To earn points you have to touch the screen when you are overlapping the white glowing orbs on the screen. Has you earn points the alien moves faster, making harder to catch the orbs.

title: Tax Escape
description: In Tax Escape you have to flee from a horde of tax collectors that wants your money! You have to avoid them at all cost! Pay attention to the rolling barrels on the street, and touch the screen to jump above them. If you hit them you will slow down, risking to be catched from the evil tax collectors!

title: Red or Green
description: In Red or Green you have to guess if there are more Green Creatures or Red Creatures. You can count or just try to guess approximately if there are more Red or Green Creatures. If your answer is right you will earn a point and then it will asked once again what color is predominant, but every time the timer will run faster!

title: Vertical Slide
description: Vertical Slide is a gravity switch endless runner game where you need quick reflexes to avoid the obstacles and collect the white glowing orb. Touch the screen to switch the gravity and move up and down on the screen. Collect as many orbs as you can e make the best score ever!

title: Abstract Sliding
description: Abstract Sliding is a slider game with awful handmade drawings. Try to recompose the image using as less moves as you can. Try three different difficulty level and choose the image that you like the most. Use your brain and solve the puzzle!

title: Don't Move
description: Don't move is a reinterpretation of the famous Red Light Green Light game. You have to guess which one of the monsters on the screen has moved. When the game starts there are only two monsters, but as you proceed in the game, the numbers of monsters on screen will increase. Stay focus if you do not want to kill the wrong monster!

title: Resuscit-hate
description: In Resuscit-hate you are an unlucky paramedic that has to resuscitate a man who apparently suffered an heart attack while he was out for a walk. If it wasn't hard enough, you have the man's family on your back, ready to punish you if you won't resuscitate him asap. Touch the screen at the right time, or you will lose his life... and yours!

title: Morph Shoot
description: In Morphshooter you have to shoot to the right monster looking only at its shape. look carefully the creature's shape on the bottom of the screen and then try to find the same monster, than click on it! But do it  fast, before the time runs out!

title: Blobkill
description: Blobkill is a throwing knives game, where you hate to touch the screen at the right time. If you miss the target more than 3 times, it will be game over. Every time you hit a target the knife rotation speed increases, making the game harder and harder

title: Double Blob
description: Double Blob is a game an endless vertical avoid and collect game, where you have to control two birds, and make them pass through small holes in the walls. The game starts slowly, but after a couple of minutes, you will need to draw all your skills to avoid to crash the birds on the moving walls!

title: Brickscape - Breakout Adventure
description:
Brickscape: Breakout Adventure
Prepare for an exhilarating journey through a mesmerizing world of vibrant glass-bricks in 
Brickscape: Breakout Adventure, the ultimate Brick Breaker game that seamlessly blends simplicity 
with dazzling excitement. Challenge yourself as you wield the power to control an array of visually 
stunning balls, each evolving based on your performance to ensure an immersive and personalized gaming 
experience. Brickscape: Breakout Adventure is not just a game; it's a visual spectacle that adapts to your 
skills, promising hours of colorful fun and addictive gameplay.

Key Features:
Dynamic Ball Evolution
Strategic Glass-Brick Layouts
Performance-Driven Scoring

title: Pastel Palette Fun
description:
Dive into a world of vibrant hues and challenging decisions with "Pastel Palette Fun" – the ultimate color selection mobile game - selecting the lighter of two pastel shades! Immerse yourself in a visually stunning experience where your keen eye for shades will be put to the test.
•	Choose Wisely
•	Race Against Time
•	Mesmerizing Pastels
Ready for a mesmerizing journey through a world of pastel wonders? Download "Pastel Palette Fun" now and prove that you have the perfect eye for the subtle beauty of lighter shades!

title: Sliding Puzzle - The 15 Puzzle
description:
Silding puzzle (the 15-puzzle game) for people who want to enjoy and relax their mind! Many puzzles to solve. In various difficulty and sizes.

This offline sliding puzzle game has many classic sliding games and comes in 3 difficulty levels.

Features:

- 3 difficulties level. Ability to choose the size of puzzle.

- Clean and familiar interface

- Game is saved automatically, continue where you left off

title: Monster Arena
description:
Monster Arena is a game where humans go to see monsters fighting in an arena.
You are one of them and you are fighting for your survival, how many monsters can you kill? and how many waves will you be able to resist?

title: Stunt Rider
description: In this exciting game, you will take on the role of an experienced stuntman, performing daring stunts on your motorcycle at different levels. Unlock new levels and buy cool motorcycles in the Stunt Rider game.

title: Wild Blueshark
description: wild blueshark is an html5 arcade game, play as a hungry shark that will eat anything in the sea, get as many items as possible and get the highest score

title: Super Aircraft Shooter
description: super aircraft shooter is an html5 top-down shooting game, get the items that appear and defeat the enemy aircraft quickly

title: Bunny Bomb
description: Bunny Bomb is an arcade, pixel art game where you're a bunny and you have to avoid the bombs or jump over them to increase your score, use the arrows for the movement and spacebar to pause the game.

title: Qubycall
description: Bienvenue dans Qubycall, un jeu 3D captivant qui vous plonge dans un monde de plaisir et d'interactivité illimités ! Prenez le commandement d'une balle et défiez la gravité pour grimper en haut du classement. Laissez votre empreinte et faites-vous un nom dans ce jeu captivant et stimulant.

title: Gem Twins
description: You control two brothers with the ability to turn themselves into stone to help each other.

title: Cannon Balls - Arcade
description: Cannon Balls is an exciting casual game that puts skills to the test. you only have a limited number of balls at your disposal. Plan your shots wisely to maximize the impact and clear each level. Can you skillfully bring down all the targets with the available cannonballs? Show off your precision and enjoy the thrilling challenge of Cannon Balls!

title: Mr Mood
description:
Embark on an exhilarating odyssey through the vibrant and dynamic world of "Mr Mood" This game is a celebration of life, adventure, and discovery, designed to uplift your spirits and ignite a sense of wonder. As you traverse the diverse landscapes filled with color and energy, you'll experience a mood that is both invigorating and uplifting.

"Mr Mood" invites you into a realm where every sunrise paints the sky in hues of warmth and where the air is filled with the sounds of nature awakening. The game's vibrant visuals and lively soundtrack create a mood that is positively infectious, fostering a sense of joy and optimism as you navigate through the enchanting environments.

title: Glitch Guy Gravity Run
description: Glitch Guy gravity run is an arcade, pixel art game where you're a guy that have to avoid ghost and run and change gravity to increase your score.

title: Monster School Challenges
description:
The students quarreled together in monster school! Do bottle flip challenge with Herobrine! Become the best, show what you can do.

Help Noob, Pro, Enderguy, Herobrine, Craftsman and others to complete the training. This funny challenge where floor is lava.

Features:
- 3 monster school challenges
- funny memes and jokes
- very emotional game

title: Stickman That One Level
description:
Stickman has fallen into a trap and needs to escape from prison! Solve stickman puzzles on non-unique jail levels. Great stick war legacy timekiller with jailbreak quest with stick. Develop intelligence and increase IQ. Find the key and open 100 doors!

• 100 non-unique levels
• 100 unique ways to win
• And stickman that rises from the dead again
• Epic bosses vs your desire to escape from prison

title: Stickman vs Monster School
description:
Stickman and Monster School is a game about stickman where you have to pick up different weapons and clear levels from mobs from monster school.

Game contains:
- 60 levels
- 10 bosses
- Many types of different weapons!

title: House Flip
description: Buy, fix, and flip houses with a click of your mouse or a tap of your finger in House Flip! Browse the listings, then purchase and inspect a house to see what needs fixing. Hold an open house to see which renovations prospective buyers want. Choose a section of the house to clean, repair, or upgrade, and then play mini-games to do the work yourself. Satisfy the buyers with wise choices and high quality work to push their offers higher. Once you're in the profit-zone, flip that house! Make millions!

title: Layer Master
description:
One of the most amazing features of the game is how simple it is. All you have to do is collect the hoops scattered all over the track and avoid obstacles in the form of blocks and other stickman in order to defeat the boss at the end! The more hoops you collect, the bigger your head will be, which can give you a nice bonus at the final stage of the level.

What are you waiting for? Start playing right now and test your dexterity and concentration skills. Pass all the obstacles in your way and destroy the boss! Whether you are looking for a fun way to pass the time or you are an experienced gamer, this game is sure to provide you with hours of entertainment.

title: Obunga's Backrooms
description: Step into the obunga's backrooms, an intense and heart-pounding 3D horror game that will keep you on the edge of your seat. Are you brave enough to navigate through the twisted corridors and try to escape?

title: Arctic Ale
description: After endless festive revelry, the snowman feels awful, and memories of the past holidays seem like hazy clouds. Urgently needing help to restore his health, the key to recovery lies in a special elixir - Arctic Ale. However, obtaining it is not so simple. Assist the snowman in collecting as much of this elixir as possible to restore his vitality and clarity of memories about the mysterious holidays.

title: Mini Stilts
description: Use your stilts to evade obstacles and reach a delicious candy!

title: Space Mamo
description:
Space Mamo is a open space shooting game. In which you defeating enemies and bosses to complete the levels. The difficulties increases as the level increases. Don't worry you will get power ups during game play. You will feel like real space war. Enjoy : )

*How To Play :

  Virtual Joystick is there 

   Left Joystick - For moving Spaceship

   Right Joystick - For shooting bullets

title: Duck Duck Clicker
description:
If you feel liking petting ducks, you have arrived at the right place! Click, upgrade, make billions of cute little ducklings to conquer the universe. 
Make it yours! Through a wide range of customizations, you can make the most adorable duck yet to exist in the world.

title: Dusya and Lava
description: This addictive puzzle game is reminiscent of the classic Sokoban game where you have to move boxes to achieve a certain goal. However, unlike Sokoban, here you have to not only move boxes, but also avoid lava, collect keys and catch a ball that has flown into the portal. This game offers an exciting journey full of interesting challenges and exciting obstacles. Help Dusya overcome all difficulties and return the ball!

title: 2048 Wood Block
description: A puzzle game where you have to match numbers from wooden blocks. Example: 2+2=4, 4+4=8, 8+8=16, etc. Be careful and choose the right moves so as not to litter the field. Check how far you will reach the top of player ratings around the world. Good game!

title: Don't Press It
description:
A friend brought you to a secret base,
but he had an urgent need to leave.

He asked you not to touch anything
because it could have dire consequences.

title: Biozombie of Evil 2
description: Biozombie of Evil 2 is a zombie shooting game where you play role of a skilled biohazard soldier and your mission is to survive zombie contaminated city streets. You can find driveable vehicle on each level and big arsenal of weapons to unlock.

title: BFFs Flowers Inspired Fashion
description: Welcome to the BFFs Flowers Inspired Fashion. These Bffs are true trendsetters, who love to enjoy the latest fashion. They love nature and natural styles in fashion. They are obsessed with floral designs. Browse their wardrobe and select their favorite one. Then pick suitable costumes and hairstyles which match their outfits.

title: Bffs Spring Break Fashionista
description: Welcome to the Bffs Spring Break Fashionista. Spring break is here. Barbie and their friends are can’t wait to have some fun together. They’ve been waiting for the spring break since the beginning of the year. Help them prepare their spring break outfits! They can finally wear skirts and dresses since it’s really warm outside now, so make sure to create a cute look! Have fun!

title: Heartscape Hero
description:
Embark on an enchanting adventure through whimsical lands filled with love and romance. As the protagonist, your mission is to collect hearts scattered, overcoming obstacles and challenges along the way.

Immerse yourself in a vibrant world teeming with charm and excitement, inspired by the magic of Valentine’s Day. Experience the power of love as you journey to become the ultimate Heartscape Hero.

Are you ready to explore this captivating realm and spread love wherever you go?

title: Mr. Macagi
description:
Embark on a hilarious adventure with Mr. Macagi, on a quest to collect apples. The challenge intensifies as mischievous monsters lurk, adding an element of suspense.

Can you help Mr. Macagi gather apples while evading these comical creatures? Get ready for a delightful and entertaining gaming experience!

title: Icewizard Adventure
description: icewizard adventure is an action adventure game, explore all levels get items in all levels and defeat enemies and bosses

title: Prism Fashionistas Dress to Impress
description: Explore Prism Girls, a captivating dress-up game with seven dolls embodying rainbow colors. From fiery Ruby to elegant Luna, each brings a unique vibe. Seamlessly blend makeup and dress-up, experimenting with eyeshadow, lipstick, and more. In the dress-up level, mix accessories and outfits for endless creativity. Prism Girls is a joyful adventure into colorful expression and fashion possibilities. Unleash your creativity and enjoy the pure fun of style exploration!

title: Zombie Treasure Adventure
description: zombie treasure adventure is an html5 platformer action game, get the treasure stored in the zombie forest, defeat and kill zombies in all levels get items

title: Zombies Assault
description: zombie assault is an html5 platformer action game, defend your territory from zombie attacks, shoot them and destroy the enemies that come, get coins in all levels and get gems to go to the next level

title: Vegetables Crush
description: vegetables crush is a match 3 html5 game, draw a line to match and get lots of points

title: Sky Fighter 2 Groundwar
description: sky fighter 2 groundwar is a vertically scrolling shoot 'em html5 game, defeat shooting enemies get items and be the winner

title: Cyber Knight Slashman
description: cyber knight slashman is an html5 action platformer game, fight against enemy robots and get items in all stages

title: Duck Shoot
description: Duck Shoot is an HTML5 arcade shooting game, aim at the duck and shoot first, don't shoot the rooster

title: Valentine's Match 3
description: Valentins Match 3 and enjoy this addictive hearts matching different colours game as you collect items and complete different missions.Your goal is to clear the hearts by finding and matching all hearts before the time runs out!

title: Blondy in Pink
description: Rencontrez le favori universel-Blondie! Elle est une vraie fashionista et une fille très mignonne. Et comme toutes les filles, Blondie adore le rose! Passons une journée avec cette charmante blonde. D'abord, nous apprenons comment elle prend soin de son visage. Ensuite, choisissez pour Blondie lumineux maquillage élégant avec toutes sortes de nuances de rose. Après le maquillage vient le tour d'une coiffure magnifique et des bijoux brillants. Et enfin, choisissez l'une des nombreuses tenues brillantes pour notre fille. Ne pas oublier de compléter les vêtements avec des accessoires de mode. Maintenant, emmenez votre animal de compagnie avec vous et partez pour une promenade avec Blondie.

title: Festival Dia de Muertos
description: Le jour des Morts est une joyeuse fête de la vie. L'amour, la mémoire et la vénération sont les thèmes principaux de cet événement. Le jour des Morts est célébré au Mexique et aux États-Unis, dans des endroits où vivent de grandes communautés mexicaines. Cette année, les princesses la petite Sirène, Lisa et Jacqueline participent également au Festival. Aidez les filles à faire un maquillage impressionnant Pour le jour des Morts, créer une coiffure luxueuse avec des tresses et, bien sûr, choisir des tenues décentes pour une fête aussi inhabituelle!

title: Princess Sweet Kawaii Fashion
description: La princesse Eliza se rend au Japon pour étudier le style kawaii adolescent. La gamme principale de la garde - robe kawaii-les nuances touchantes traditionnelles: rose, vert pâle, jaune, bleu. Les images des personnages d'anime préférés sont souvent utilisées comme impressions. Et toutes sortes d'arcs, de dentelles et de volants sont utilisés comme ornements. Le style kawaii présente également une couleur de cheveux inhabituelle. Et le maquillage n'est limité que par votre imagination. Il n'y a pas de place pour les nuances ennuyeuses, seulement des tons doux et des paillettes! Créez votre propre look kawaii unique avec la princesse Elisa!

title: Parking Order
description: "Parking Order!" is a fantastic puzzle game that allows you to test your parking and driving skills. By parking your cars in the correct order, you can unlock new levels and embark on a thrilling adventure, progressing from simple to complex levels.

title: Poppy Stickman Battle Royale
description:
poppy stickman battle royale Game with various Missions of Fighting
Play Incredible Stickman Games and Smash all the Superhero Stickman Villains
Become poppy Stickman Hero to destroy all the Villains or Gangsters’ Monsters
Show your Superhero Incredible skills to Smash the City with Monster Fighting.

title: Lucy All Season Fashionista
description:
Découvrez Lucy, la Fashionista toutes saisons, qui maîtrise avec aisance chaque tendance saisonnière. De l'élégance chaleureuse de l'hiver aux styles aériens de l'été, suivez son parcours mode à travers toutes les saisons. Laissez-vous inspirer pour rehausser votre garde-robe avec les conseils avisés et les choix de mode polyvalents de Lucy. Adoptez un style qui transcende chaque saison !

Fonctionnalités

Niveaux saisonniers : Automne, Hiver, Été et Printemps : Chaque saison représente un niveau avec des thèmes distincts et des palettes de couleurs spécifiques.

Éléments d'habillage : Sélection de vêtements : Une garde-robe étendue proposant des tenues spécifiques à chaque saison. Mix and Match : Les joueurs peuvent combiner tops, bas, robes et vêtements d'extérieur pour créer divers looks.

Options de coiffure : Coiffures saisonnières : Des coiffures allant des chapeaux d'hiver confortables aux vagues estivales fluide, correspondant au style de chaque saison. Couleurs de cheveux : Des couleurs de cheveux personnalisables et des styles pour s'harmoniser avec les tenues sélectionnées.

Adapté aux mobiles : Conçu pour être accessible aussi bien sur les ordinateurs que sur les appareils mobiles, permettant aux joueurs de profiter du jeu sur leur plateforme préférée.

title: Spaceship Explorer
description: spaceship explorer is an endless flying html5 game, touch and hold the screen to fly through space avoiding incoming enemies and get a score

title: Jungle Coloring Game
description: Unleash your creativity and immerse yourself in a world of vivid colors with Jungle Coloring Coloring Game! This interactive coloring book brings a delightful experience for artists of all ages. Dive into an expansive collection of designs ranging from serene landscapes to intricate patterns. Jungle Coloring Coloring Game offers an escape to a digital canvas where imagination is your only limit. Choose your palette, fill in the hues, and watch each page come to life with every touch. Whether you're looking to relax, improve your coloring skills, or simply have some fun, Jungle Coloring Coloring Game is the perfect blend of entertainment and relaxation. Ready your colors and bring joy to your day with Jungle Coloring Coloring Game - where every stroke adds brightness to your world!

You can spend your money in the shop where you can change ship's skin and statistics.

Family-Friendly

title: Dots n Lines
description:
Dots n Lines is a simple game to learn, but mastery requires strategic thinking. Don't just focus on immediate boxes; anticipate how your lines might create future opportunities for yourself or block your 
opponent. Boxes in the center of the grid offer more potential connections, so try to claim them early.  Sometimes, deliberately drawing lines that benefit your opponent slightly can force them to complete boxes you want, giving you another turn. Don't be afraid to take risks and make unexpected moves to surprise your opponent.


Key Features:
Classic Gameplay
Complete with Smart AI components
Challenge players from around the globe
Family-Friendly
Endless Fun

title: Bullet and Cry in Space
description:
Bullet and cry in space is a action horror first person shooter game set in a massive dark spaceship.

Experience the ultimate thrill with our action horror first person shooter game set in a dark spaceship. Immerse yourself in an adventure as you navigate through the eerie corridors of a dark spacecraft. With realistic graphics and intense sound effects, you'll feel like you're truly trapped in this terrifying world. As you make your way through the ship, you'll encounter gruesome creatures lurking in the shadows, you must fight for humanity and uncover the mysteries of the abandoned vessel. Be prepared for intense battles and scares as you uncover the dark secrets hidden within the spaceship.

With a combination of action, horror, and first person shooter elements, this game is perfect for shooter and horror enthusiasts alike.

Game features

    Varied and atmospheric environment
    Interesting enemies and monsters
    Simple and entertaining story
    Intense action shooter gameplay

title: Island Wars
description: Island Wars. An interesting arcade shooter with many locations. Pass all bosses and destroy all enemies, Explore interesting locations, Play on all your devices, Good mood and good luck in battle.

title: Impossible Car Stunt Game
description: Welcome to the world of real impossible tracks car racing games. Enjoy the race on the endless extreme tracks in the sky highs. If you are a fast speed racer and have a passion for car racing games then be ready to experience the car rally in the mid of sky with no limits in free games. Rush like a crazy stunt master while riding the beautifully designed real tracks and beat the rival racers in this breathtaking adventure car game. Perform the extreme car driving drifts and insane acrobatic mid-air flips on the impossible track 3D and rush like a real car drifter. The impossible racing is a real challenge, so fasten your seat belt before taking off and win this car racing simulator game 2019. Unlike other car stunt games, this off road car rally is going to be a real fun and adventure of car games. You will surely get addicted to this insane game. Get ready to play the world no. Play free games and enjoy 1 drift car racing game and enjoy the crazy and insane car stunts simulator in most realistic manner of car game. Perform the stunts by playingthe game!

title: Bullet And Jump
description:
In this adventure, bullets are coming from everywhere, and you must dodge them. Run away from the bullets for 100 seconds and win. Choose either the blue or red player along with your friend and dodge all the bullets. Every time you touch a bullet, the duration increases by 1 second, so be careful and avoid touching them. Compete with your friend and win; you need to defeat your friend.

*Press WASD keys to move the red player. 
*Press the Arrow keys to move the blue player.
*Dodge for 100 seconds, and the first one to finish the time wins.

Chaque fois que Morozy a une raison : une situation difficile, une situation difficile et une période inconnue. Est-ce que tu penses que c'est à ce moment-là que tu es le plus grand de tous?

title: Mask Man Adventure
description:
Mask Man Adventure is a mobile game with a rich variety of action levels. In the game, players need to control their characters to pass the levels, avoid various obstacles in the game, and collect coins and keys. There are two different colored characters to choose from, and many props can trigger different effects to defeat those annoying mechanisms, Quickly pick up more gems.

Mask Man Adventure Game Features
1. You can challenge levels, create unique creativity, and join in exploring diverse game types.
2. Control the character to embark on an adventure, defeat the enemies encountered on the way with skills to achieve the final victory.
3. Explore different terrains to the fullest, constantly hone your skills, and challenge the final boss.

Mask Man Adventure Gameplay
1. The playability is very high, not only through various levels, but also to compete with the boss, which is very interesting.
2.In the game, players need to control their characters to embark on adventures. When encountering enemies on the way, they must defeat them with skills to achieve the final victory.
3. Avoid the range of crisis patrols, find the correct maze route, and quickly complete all the adventures that arise.

Mask Man Adventure Game Description
1. Agility is required to challenge fearless ideas in order to join adventurous and thrilling tasks.
As the adventure process of levels becomes increasingly difficult and intense, you can use props to defeat those annoying mechanisms.
3. Show the player's intelligent thinking and escape ability, the more difficult the attack and challenge attributes will gradually increase.

Advantages of Mask Man Adventure Game
1. Challenge unique levels and join the exploration of diverse game types.
2. Think flexibly and complete the tests that appear before you.
3. Avoid the range of crisis patrols, find the correct maze route, and quickly complete all the adventures that arise.

Highlights of Mask Man Adventure Game
1. The game graphics are simple and fresh, with a great visual experience, greatly enhancing the gaming experience.
2. The control method of the virtual joystick is to control the movement of the character from front to back, left and right on the left, and to release the theft skill on the right.
3. Explore different terrains to the fullest, constantly hone your skills, and challenge the final boss.

description: Smash est une mise à niveau passionnante du jeu de cache-cache classique ! Dans le jeu, vous serez affecté au hasard à l’équipe Blue hide ou à l’équipe Red Smash. Si vous êtes un cacheur, votre mission est de vous déplacer doucement et rapidement, de vous fondre dans votre environnement en faisant semblant d'être un objet normal et de récupérer toutes les clés avant que vos adversaires ne vous découvrent et ne vous écrasent.

title: Memorix
description:
Title: Memory Madness & Puzzle Pursuit

Description:
Embark on a whimsical journey of fun and challenge with our latest game, "Memory Madness & Puzzle Pursuit"! Test your memory skills and unravel mind-bending puzzles in this engaging and entertaining adventure, available exclusively on Crazy Games.

🧠 Memory Madness:
Get ready to exercise your brain with a captivating memory game! Flip and match hilarious and colorful images in a race against the clock. As you progress, the levels become increasingly challenging, pushing your memory to its limits. Uncover surprises, unlock new themes, and compete for high scores. Sharpen your cognitive abilities while having a blast with this addictive memory challenge!

🎲 Puzzle Pursuit:
But wait, there's more! Dive into the world of Puzzle Pursuit, where you'll encounter a series of intricate puzzles that will test your problem-solving skills. Each puzzle is uniquely designed with vibrant and amusing visuals, adding an extra layer of excitement to the game. Piece together the elements, overcome obstacles, and revel in the satisfaction of completing each mind-bending puzzle.

title: Popcorn Time
description:
Popcorn time is a game that is very suitable for those of you who like relaxing games. Popcorn game that you can play anywhere and anytime. With a popcorn popper, you can pop the popcorn until it's completely filled. 

You may be wondering, is the popcorn pop game even fun? So why don't you try playing it now? To play this popcorn game you also have to pay attention to popcorn trivia, because you will be required to fill the bucket until it is full and the popcorn must not spill or get out of the bucket. So you have to be careful when filling the bucket with the popcorn maker. 

Feature : 
- 80 Levels 
- Interesting animation 
- Design and effects 
- Popcorn pop with levels full of challenges 
- Easy to understand to play 

So don't hesitate to play this exciting popcorn time. Don't forget to leave a review so we can be even better at developing this popcorn time game. Thank You

title: Suika World
description: This is a popular Japanese puzzle game. In it, you need to score as many points as possible by connecting the same fruits. But the distinctive feature of this particular game is the additional objects on the levels. You may come across a stone that cannot be connected to anything. Or a bomb that will push away all the fruits around it, and at the same time break all the stones. There are other interesting bonuses on the levels.

title: Speed-Run Platformer 2D!
description:
How Fast can You Complete this Timed Platformer?
Speed-Run Platformer 2D is a challenge to complete this seemingly simple 2D platformer in as little time as possible!
How fast can you complete it?

title: Retro Space Dodger!
